430 // POST /api/v1/annotations - Create annotation
431 CROW_ROUTE(app, "/api/v1/annotations")
432 .methods(crow::HTTPMethod::POST)([ctx](const crow::request &req) {
433 crow::response res;
434 res.add_header("Content-Type", "application/json");
435 add_cors_headers(res, *ctx);
436
437 if (!ctx->database) {
438 res.code = 503;
439 res.body =
440 make_error_json("DATABASE_UNAVAILABLE", "Database not configured");
441 return res;
442 }
443
444 std::string body = req.body;
445 if (body.empty()) {
446 res.code = 400;
447 res.body = make_error_json("INVALID_REQUEST", "Request body is empty");
448 return res;
449 }
450
451 storage::annotation_record ann;
452 ann.annotation_id = generate_uuid();
453 ann.study_uid = parse_json_string(body, "study_uid");
454 ann.series_uid = parse_json_string(body, "series_uid");
455 ann.sop_instance_uid = parse_json_string(body, "sop_instance_uid");
456 ann.frame_number = parse_json_int(body, "frame_number");
457 ann.user_id = parse_json_string(body, "user_id");
458
459 auto type_str = parse_json_string(body, "annotation_type");
460 auto type_opt = storage::annotation_type_from_string(type_str);
461 if (!type_opt.has_value()) {
462 res.code = 400;
463 res.body = make_error_json("INVALID_TYPE", "Invalid annotation type");
464 return res;
465 }
466 ann.type = type_opt.value();
467
468 ann.geometry_json = parse_json_object(body, "geometry");
469 ann.text = parse_json_string(body, "text");
470 ann.style = parse_style(parse_json_object(body, "style"));
471 ann.created_at = std::chrono::system_clock::now();
472 ann.updated_at = ann.created_at;
473
474 if (ann.study_uid.empty()) {
475 res.code = 400;
476 res.body = make_error_json("MISSING_FIELD", "study_uid is required");
477 return res;
478 }
479
480 auto repo = make_annotation_repo(ctx->database.get());
481 auto save_result = repo.save(ann);
482 if (!save_result.is_ok()) {
483 res.code = 500;
484 res.body =
485 make_error_json("SAVE_ERROR", save_result.error().message);
486 return res;
487 }
488
489 res.code = 201;
490 std::ostringstream oss;
491 oss << R"({"annotation_id":")" << json_escape(ann.annotation_id)
492 << R"(","created_at":")" << format_timestamp(ann.created_at)
493 << R"("})";
494 res.body = oss.str();
495 return res;
496 });

505 if (!ctx->database) {

536
537 storage::annotation_query count_query = query;
538 count_query.limit = 0;
539 count_query.offset = 0;
540 size_t total_count = count_annotations(repo, count_query);

542 auto annotations = search_annotations(repo, query);
543
544 res.code = 200;
545 res.body = annotations_to_json(annotations, total_count);
546 return res;

550 CROW_ROUTE(app, "/api/v1/annotations/<string>")
551 .methods(crow::HTTPMethod::GET)(
552 [ctx](const crow::request & /*req*/, const std::string &annotation_id) {
553 crow::response res;
554 res.add_header("Content-Type", "application/json");

556

559 res.body = make_error_json("DATABASE_UNAVAILABLE",

562 }

577 // PUT /api/v1/annotations/<annotationId> - Update annotation
578 CROW_ROUTE(app, "/api/v1/annotations/<string>")
579 .methods(crow::HTTPMethod::PUT)(
580 [ctx](const crow::request &req, const std::string &annotation_id) {
581 crow::response res;
582 res.add_header("Content-Type", "application/json");
583 add_cors_headers(res, *ctx);
584
585 if (!ctx->database) {
586 res.code = 503;
587 res.body = make_error_json("DATABASE_UNAVAILABLE",
588 "Database not configured");
589 return res;
590 }
591
592 auto repo = make_annotation_repo(ctx->database.get());
593 auto existing = find_annotation(repo, annotation_id);
594 if (!existing.has_value()) {
595 res.code = 404;
596 res.body = make_error_json("NOT_FOUND", "Annotation not found");
597 return res;
598 }
599
600 std::string body = req.body;
601 if (body.empty()) {
602 res.code = 400;
603 res.body =
604 make_error_json("INVALID_REQUEST", "Request body is empty");
605 return res;
606 }
607
608 storage::annotation_record ann = existing.value();
609 auto geometry = parse_json_object(body, "geometry");
610 if (geometry != "{}") {
611 ann.geometry_json = geometry;
612 }
613 auto text = parse_json_string(body, "text");
614 if (!text.empty() || body.find("\"text\":\"\"") != std::string::npos) {
615 ann.text = text;
616 }
617 auto style_json = parse_json_object(body, "style");
618 if (style_json != "{}") {
619 ann.style = parse_style(style_json);
620 }
621 ann.updated_at = std::chrono::system_clock::now();
622
623 auto update_result = repo.update(ann);
624 if (!update_result.is_ok()) {
625 res.code = 500;
626 res.body =
627 make_error_json("UPDATE_ERROR", update_result.error().message);
628 return res;
629 }
630
631 res.code = 200;
632 std::ostringstream oss;
633 oss << R"({"annotation_id":")" << json_escape(ann.annotation_id)
634 << R"(","updated_at":")" << format_timestamp(ann.updated_at)
635 << R"("})";
636 res.body = oss.str();
637 return res;
638 });
639
640 // DELETE /api/v1/annotations/<annotationId> - Delete annotation
641 CROW_ROUTE(app, "/api/v1/annotations/<string>")
642 .methods(crow::HTTPMethod::DELETE)(
643 [ctx](const crow::request & /*req*/, const std::string &annotation_id) {
644 crow::response res;
645 add_cors_headers(res, *ctx);
646
647 if (!ctx->database) {
648 res.code = 503;
649 res.add_header("Content-Type", "application/json");
650 res.body = make_error_json("DATABASE_UNAVAILABLE",
651 "Database not configured");
652 return res;
653 }
654
655 auto repo = make_annotation_repo(ctx->database.get());
656 if (!annotation_exists(repo, annotation_id)) {
657 res.code = 404;
658 res.add_header("Content-Type", "application/json");
659 res.body = make_error_json("NOT_FOUND", "Annotation not found");
660 return res;
661 }
662
663 auto remove_result = repo.remove(annotation_id);
664 if (!remove_result.is_ok()) {
665 res.code = 500;
666 res.add_header("Content-Type", "application/json");
667 res.body =
668 make_error_json("DELETE_ERROR", remove_result.error().message);
669 return res;
670 }
671
672 res.code = 204;
673 return res;
674 });
675
676 // GET /api/v1/instances/<sopInstanceUid>/annotations - Get annotations for instance
677 CROW_ROUTE(app, "/api/v1/instances/<string>/annotations")
678 .methods(crow::HTTPMethod::GET)(
679 [ctx](const crow::request & /*req*/,
680 const std::string &sop_instance_uid) {
681 crow::response res;
682 res.add_header("Content-Type", "application/json");
683 add_cors_headers(res, *ctx);
684
685 if (!ctx->database) {
686 res.code = 503;
687 res.body = make_error_json("DATABASE_UNAVAILABLE",
688 "Database not configured");
689 return res;
690 }
691
692 auto repo = make_annotation_repo(ctx->database.get());
693 auto annotations = find_by_instance(repo, sop_instance_uid);
694
695 std::ostringstream oss;
696 oss << R"({"data":[)";
697 for (size_t i = 0; i < annotations.size(); ++i) {
698 if (i > 0) {
699 oss << ",";
700 }
701 oss << annotation_to_json(annotations[i]);
702 }
703 oss << "]}";
704
705 res.code = 200;
706 res.body = oss.str();
707 return res;
708 });

78 CROW_ROUTE(app, "/api/v1/associations/active")
79 .methods(crow::HTTPMethod::GET)([ctx](const crow::request & /*req*/) {
80 crow::response res;
81 res.add_header("Content-Type", "application/json");
82 add_cors_headers(res, *ctx);
83
84 if (!ctx->dicom_server) {
85 res.code = 503;
86 res.body = make_error_json("SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE",

89 }
90
91 auto stats = ctx->dicom_server->get_statistics();

93 auto uptime_sec = stats.uptime().count();
94
95 std::ostringstream oss;
96 oss << R"({"active_count":)" << active_count
97 << R"(,"total_associations":)" << stats.total_associations
98 << R"(,"rejected_associations":)" << stats.rejected_associations
99 << R"(,"messages_processed":)" << stats.messages_processed
100 << R"(,"bytes_received":)" << stats.bytes_received
101 << R"(,"bytes_sent":)" << stats.bytes_sent
102 << R"(,"uptime_seconds":)" << uptime_sec
103 << R"(,"server_running":)"
104 << (ctx->dicom_server->is_running() ? "true" : "false")
105 << '}';
106
107 res.code = 200;
108 res.body = oss.str();
109 return res;
110 });

112 // DELETE /api/v1/associations/:id - Terminate a DICOM association
113 CROW_ROUTE(app, "/api/v1/associations/<string>")
114 .methods(crow::HTTPMethod::DELETE)(
115 [ctx](const crow::request & /*req*/,
116 const std::string &association_id) {
117 crow::response res;
118 res.add_header("Content-Type", "application/json");
119 add_cors_headers(res, *ctx);
120
121 if (association_id.empty()) {
122 res.code = 400;
123 res.body = make_error_json("INVALID_REQUEST",
124 "Association ID is required");
125 return res;
126 }
127
128 if (!ctx->dicom_server) {
129 res.code = 503;
130 res.body = make_error_json("SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE",
131 "DICOM server not configured");
132 return res;
133 }
134
135 // Individual association termination is not supported via the
136 // dicom_server public API. The server manages association
137 // lifecycles internally through idle timeouts and graceful
138 // shutdown.
139 res.code = 501;
140 res.body = make_error_json(
141 "NOT_IMPLEMENTED",
142 "Individual association termination is not supported. "
143 "Associations are managed by the DICOM server via idle "
144 "timeouts and graceful shutdown.");
145 return res;
146 });
147
148 // GET /api/v1/associations/:id - Get specific association details
149 CROW_ROUTE(app, "/api/v1/associations/<string>")
150 .methods(crow::HTTPMethod::GET)(
151 [ctx](const crow::request & /*req*/,
152 const std::string &association_id) {
153 crow::response res;
154 res.add_header("Content-Type", "application/json");
155 add_cors_headers(res, *ctx);
156
157 if (association_id.empty()) {
158 res.code = 400;
159 res.body = make_error_json("INVALID_REQUEST",
160 "Association ID is required");
161 return res;
162 }
163
164 if (!ctx->dicom_server) {
165 res.code = 503;
166 res.body = make_error_json("SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE",
167 "DICOM server not configured");
168 return res;
169 }
170
171 // Individual association lookup is not supported via the
172 // dicom_server public API. Use GET /associations/active for
173 // aggregate statistics.
174 res.code = 501;
175 res.body = make_error_json(
176 "NOT_IMPLEMENTED",
177 "Individual association lookup is not supported. "
178 "Use GET /api/v1/associations/active for aggregate "
179 "statistics.");
180 return res;
181 });
182}

187 // GET /api/v1/audit/logs - List audit log entries (paginated)
188 CROW_ROUTE(app, "/api/v1/audit/logs")
189 .methods(crow::HTTPMethod::GET)([ctx](const crow::request &req) {
190 crow::response res;
191 res.add_header("Content-Type", "application/json");
192 add_cors_headers(res, *ctx);
193
194 if (!ctx->database) {
195 res.code = 503;
196 res.body =
197 make_error_json("DATABASE_UNAVAILABLE", "Database not configured");
198 return res;
199 }
200
201 // Parse pagination
202 auto [limit, offset] = parse_pagination(req);
203
204 // Build query from URL parameters
205 storage::audit_query query;
206 query.limit = limit;
207 query.offset = offset;
208
209 auto event_type = req.url_params.get("event_type");
210 if (event_type) {
211 query.event_type = event_type;
212 }
213
214 auto outcome = req.url_params.get("outcome");
215 if (outcome) {
216 query.outcome = outcome;
217 }
218
219 auto user_id = req.url_params.get("user_id");
220 if (user_id) {
221 query.user_id = user_id;
222 }
223
224 auto source_ae = req.url_params.get("source_ae");
225 if (source_ae) {
226 query.source_ae = source_ae;
227 }
228
229 auto patient_id = req.url_params.get("patient_id");
230 if (patient_id) {
231 query.patient_id = patient_id;
232 }
233
234 auto study_uid = req.url_params.get("study_uid");
235 if (study_uid) {
236 query.study_uid = study_uid;
237 }
238
239 auto date_from = req.url_params.get("date_from");
240 if (date_from) {
241 query.date_from = date_from;
242 }
243
244 auto date_to = req.url_params.get("date_to");
245 if (date_to) {
246 query.date_to = date_to;
247 }
248
249 // Check export format
250 auto format_param = req.url_params.get("format");
251 bool export_csv = format_param && std::string(format_param) == "csv";
252
253 // Get total count (without pagination)
254 storage::audit_query count_query = query;
255 count_query.limit = 0;
256 count_query.offset = 0;
257 auto all_records_result = ctx->database->query_audit_log(count_query);
258 if (!all_records_result.is_ok()) {
259 res.code = 500;
260 res.body = make_error_json("QUERY_ERROR",
261 all_records_result.error().message);
262 return res;
263 }
264 size_t total_count = all_records_result.value().size();
265
266 // Get paginated results
267 auto records_result = ctx->database->query_audit_log(query);
268 if (!records_result.is_ok()) {
269 res.code = 500;
270 res.body = make_error_json("QUERY_ERROR",
271 records_result.error().message);
272 return res;
273 }
274 auto records = std::move(records_result.value());
275
276 if (export_csv) {
277 res.add_header("Content-Type", "text/csv");
278 res.add_header("Content-Disposition",
279 "attachment; filename=\"audit_logs.csv\"");
280 res.code = 200;
281 res.body = audit_records_to_csv(records);
282 } else {
283 res.code = 200;
284 res.body = audit_records_to_json(records, total_count);
285 }
286 return res;
287 });
288
289 // GET /api/v1/audit/logs/:id - Get specific audit log entry
290 CROW_ROUTE(app, "/api/v1/audit/logs/<int>")
291 .methods(crow::HTTPMethod::GET)(
292 [ctx](const crow::request & /*req*/, int pk) {
293 crow::response res;
294 res.add_header("Content-Type", "application/json");
295 add_cors_headers(res, *ctx);
296
297 if (!ctx->database) {
298 res.code = 503;
299 res.body = make_error_json("DATABASE_UNAVAILABLE",
300 "Database not configured");
301 return res;
302 }
303
304 auto record = ctx->database->find_audit_by_pk(pk);
305 if (!record) {
306 res.code = 404;
307 res.body = make_error_json("NOT_FOUND", "Audit log entry not found");
308 return res;
309 }
310
311 res.code = 200;
312 res.body = audit_record_to_json(*record);
313 return res;
314 });
315
316 // GET /api/v1/audit/export - Export audit logs (CSV or JSON)
317 CROW_ROUTE(app, "/api/v1/audit/export")
318 .methods(crow::HTTPMethod::GET)([ctx](const crow::request &req) {
319 crow::response res;
320 add_cors_headers(res, *ctx);
321
322 if (!ctx->database) {
323 res.add_header("Content-Type", "application/json");
324 res.code = 503;
325 res.body =
326 make_error_json("DATABASE_UNAVAILABLE", "Database not configured");
327 return res;
328 }
329
330 // Build query from URL parameters (no pagination for export)
331 storage::audit_query query;
332
333 auto event_type = req.url_params.get("event_type");
334 if (event_type) {
335 query.event_type = event_type;
336 }
337
338 auto outcome = req.url_params.get("outcome");
339 if (outcome) {
340 query.outcome = outcome;
341 }
342
343 auto user_id = req.url_params.get("user_id");
344 if (user_id) {
345 query.user_id = user_id;
346 }
347
348 auto date_from = req.url_params.get("date_from");
349 if (date_from) {
350 query.date_from = date_from;
351 }
352
353 auto date_to = req.url_params.get("date_to");
354 if (date_to) {
355 query.date_to = date_to;
356 }
357
358 auto records_result = ctx->database->query_audit_log(query);
359 if (!records_result.is_ok()) {
360 res.add_header("Content-Type", "application/json");
361 res.code = 500;
362 res.body = make_error_json("QUERY_ERROR",
363 records_result.error().message);
364 return res;
365 }
366 auto records = std::move(records_result.value());
367
368 // Check export format
369 auto format_param = req.url_params.get("format");
370 std::string format = format_param ? format_param : "json";
371
372 if (format == "csv") {
373 res.add_header("Content-Type", "text/csv");
374 res.add_header("Content-Disposition",
375 "attachment; filename=\"audit_logs.csv\"");
376 res.code = 200;
377 res.body = audit_records_to_csv(records);
378 } else {
379 res.add_header("Content-Type", "application/json");
380 res.add_header("Content-Disposition",
381 "attachment; filename=\"audit_logs.json\"");
382 res.code = 200;
383 res.body = audit_records_to_json(records, records.size());
384 }
385 return res;
386 });
387}

1827 crow::response res;

1829
1830 // OAuth 2.0 / legacy auth check
1831 if (!check_dicomweb_auth(ctx, req, res,
1832 {"dicomweb.read"})) {
1833 return res;
1834 }
1835
1836 if (!ctx->database) {
1837 res.code = 503;
1838 res.add_header("Content-Type", "application/json");
1839 res.body = make_error_json("DATABASE_UNAVAILABLE",
1840 "Database not configured");

1843

1850 dicomweb::media_type::dicom_json)) {
1851 auto files_result = ctx->database->get_study_files(study_uid);

1853 res.code = 500;

1856 files_result.error().message);

1860 "/bulkdata/";
1861 return build_metadata_response(files_result.value(), *ctx, bulk_uri);
1862 }
1863
1864 // Return DICOM instances
1865 auto files_result = ctx->database->get_study_files(study_uid);

1867 res.code = 500;
1868 res.add_header("Content-Type", "application/json");
1869 res.body = make_error_json("QUERY_ERROR",
1870 files_result.error().message);
1871 return res;
1872 }
1873 std::string base_uri = "/dicomweb/studies/" + study_uid;
1874 return build_multipart_dicom_response(files_result.value(), *ctx, base_uri);
1875 });

2004 // ========================================================================

2008 // GET /dicomweb/studies/{studyUID}/series/{seriesUID}/instances/{sopUID}

2032 file_path_result.error().message);

2049 dicomweb::media_type::dicom_json)) {

2051 std::string bulk_uri = "/dicomweb/studies/" + study_uid +

2053 "/instances/" + sop_uid + "/bulkdata/";
2054 return build_metadata_response(files, *ctx, bulk_uri);
2055 }
2056
2057 // Return DICOM instance
2058 auto data = read_file_bytes(*file_path);
2059 if (data.empty()) {
2060 res.code = 500;

2062 res.body = make_error_json("READ_ERROR",
2063 "Failed to read DICOM file");
2064 return res;
2065 }
2066
2067 res.code = 200;
2068 res.add_header("Content-Type",
2069 std::string(dicomweb::media_type::dicom));
2070 res.body = std::string(reinterpret_cast<char*>(data.data()),
2071 data.size());
2072 return res;
2073 });

2116
2117 // ========================================================================
2118 // Frame Retrieval (WADO-RS)
2119 // ========================================================================
2120
2121 // GET /dicomweb/studies/{studyUID}/series/{seriesUID}/instances/{sopUID}/frames/{frameNumbers}
2122 CROW_ROUTE(app,
2123 "/dicomweb/studies/<string>/series/<string>/instances/<string>/frames/<string>")
2124 .methods(crow::HTTPMethod::GET)(
2125 [ctx](const crow::request& req,
2126 const std::string& study_uid,
2127 const std::string& series_uid,
2128 const std::string& sop_uid,
2129 const std::string& frame_list) {
2130 crow::response res;
2131 add_cors_headers(res, *ctx);
2132
2133 if (!ctx->database) {
2134 res.code = 503;
2135 res.add_header("Content-Type", "application/json");
2136 res.body = make_error_json("DATABASE_UNAVAILABLE",
2137 "Database not configured");
2138 return res;
2139 }
2140
2141 auto file_path_result = ctx->database->get_file_path(sop_uid);
2142 if (!file_path_result.is_ok()) {
2143 res.code = 500;
2144 res.add_header("Content-Type", "application/json");
2145 res.body = make_error_json("QUERY_ERROR",
2146 file_path_result.error().message);
2147 return res;
2148 }
2149 const auto& file_path = file_path_result.value();
2150 if (!file_path) {
2151 res.code = 404;
2152 res.add_header("Content-Type", "application/json");
2153 res.body = make_error_json("NOT_FOUND", "Instance not found");
2154 return res;
2155 }
2156
2157 // Parse frame numbers
2158 auto frames = dicomweb::parse_frame_numbers(frame_list);
2159 if (frames.empty()) {
2160 res.code = 400;
2161 res.add_header("Content-Type", "application/json");
2162 res.body = make_error_json("INVALID_FRAME_LIST",
2163 "No valid frame numbers specified");
2164 return res;
2165 }
2166
2167 // Load DICOM file
2168 auto data = read_file_bytes(*file_path);
2169 if (data.empty()) {
2170 res.code = 500;
2171 res.add_header("Content-Type", "application/json");
2172 res.body = make_error_json("READ_ERROR",
2173 "Failed to read DICOM file");
2174 return res;
2175 }
2176
2177 auto dicom_result = core::dicom_file::from_bytes(
2178 std::span<const uint8_t>(data.data(), data.size()));
2179 if (dicom_result.is_err()) {
2180 res.code = 500;
2181 res.add_header("Content-Type", "application/json");
2182 res.body = make_error_json("PARSE_ERROR",
2183 "Failed to parse DICOM file");
2184 return res;
2185 }
2186
2187 const auto& dataset = dicom_result.value().dataset();
2188
2189 // Get image parameters
2190 auto rows_elem = dataset.get(core::tags::rows);
2191 auto cols_elem = dataset.get(core::tags::columns);
2192 auto bits_alloc_elem = dataset.get(core::tags::bits_allocated);
2193 auto samples_elem = dataset.get(core::tags::samples_per_pixel);
2194 // Number of Frames (0028,0008)
2195 constexpr core::dicom_tag number_of_frames_tag{0x0028, 0x0008};
2196 auto num_frames_elem = dataset.get(number_of_frames_tag);
2197 auto pixel_data_elem = dataset.get(core::tags::pixel_data);
2198
2199 if (!rows_elem || !cols_elem || !pixel_data_elem) {
2200 res.code = 400;
2201 res.add_header("Content-Type", "application/json");
2202 res.body = make_error_json("NOT_IMAGE",
2203 "Instance does not contain image data");
2204 return res;
2205 }
2206
2207 uint16_t rows = rows_elem->as_numeric<uint16_t>().unwrap_or(0);
2208 uint16_t cols = cols_elem->as_numeric<uint16_t>().unwrap_or(0);
2209 uint16_t bits_allocated = bits_alloc_elem ?
2210 bits_alloc_elem->as_numeric<uint16_t>().unwrap_or(16) : 16;
2211 uint16_t samples_per_pixel = samples_elem ?
2212 samples_elem->as_numeric<uint16_t>().unwrap_or(1) : 1;
2213 uint32_t num_frames = 1;
2214 if (num_frames_elem) {
2215 try {
2216 num_frames = std::stoul(num_frames_elem->as_string().unwrap_or("1"));
2217 } catch (...) {}
2218 }
2219
2220 // Calculate frame size
2221 size_t frame_size = static_cast<size_t>(rows) * cols *
2222 samples_per_pixel * ((bits_allocated + 7) / 8);
2223
2224 auto pixel_data = pixel_data_elem->raw_data();
2225
2226 // Check Accept header
2227 auto accept = req.get_header_value("Accept");
2228
2229 // Build multipart response for multiple frames
2230 dicomweb::multipart_builder builder(
2231 dicomweb::media_type::octet_stream);
2232
2233 for (uint32_t frame_num : frames) {
2234 if (frame_num > num_frames) {
2235 // Skip invalid frame numbers
2236 continue;
2237 }
2238
2239 auto frame_data = dicomweb::extract_frame(
2240 pixel_data, frame_num, frame_size);
2241
2242 if (!frame_data.empty()) {
2243 std::string location = "/dicomweb/studies/" + study_uid +
2244 "/series/" + series_uid +
2245 "/instances/" + sop_uid +
2246 "/frames/" + std::to_string(frame_num);
2247 builder.add_part_with_location(std::move(frame_data), location);
2248 }
2249 }
2250
2251 if (builder.empty()) {
2252 res.code = 404;
2253 res.add_header("Content-Type", "application/json");
2254 res.body = make_error_json("NOT_FOUND",
2255 "No valid frames found");
2256 return res;
2257 }
2258
2259 // Return single part or multipart
2260 if (builder.size() == 1) {
2261 // Single frame - return directly
2262 auto body = builder.build();
2263 res.code = 200;
2264 res.add_header("Content-Type",
2265 std::string(dicomweb::media_type::octet_stream));
2266 // Extract just the data part from multipart
2267 auto frame_data = dicomweb::extract_frame(
2268 pixel_data, frames[0], frame_size);
2269 res.body = std::string(
2270 reinterpret_cast<char*>(frame_data.data()),
2271 frame_data.size());
2272 } else {
2273 // Multiple frames - return multipart
2274 res.code = 200;
2275 res.add_header("Content-Type", builder.content_type_header());
2276 res.body = builder.build();
2277 }
2278
2279 return res;
2280 });
2281
2282 // ========================================================================
2283 // Rendered Images (WADO-RS)
2284 // ========================================================================
2285
2286 // GET /dicomweb/studies/{studyUID}/series/{seriesUID}/instances/{sopUID}/rendered
2287 CROW_ROUTE(app,
2288 "/dicomweb/studies/<string>/series/<string>/instances/<string>/rendered")
2289 .methods(crow::HTTPMethod::GET)(
2290 [ctx](const crow::request& req,
2291 const std::string& study_uid,
2292 const std::string& series_uid,
2293 const std::string& sop_uid) {
2294 crow::response res;
2295 add_cors_headers(res, *ctx);
2296
2297 if (!ctx->database) {
2298 res.code = 503;
2299 res.add_header("Content-Type", "application/json");
2300 res.body = make_error_json("DATABASE_UNAVAILABLE",
2301 "Database not configured");
2302 return res;
2303 }
2304
2305 auto file_path_result = ctx->database->get_file_path(sop_uid);
2306 if (!file_path_result.is_ok()) {
2307 res.code = 500;
2308 res.add_header("Content-Type", "application/json");
2309 res.body = make_error_json("QUERY_ERROR",
2310 file_path_result.error().message);
2311 return res;
2312 }
2313 const auto& file_path = file_path_result.value();
2314 if (!file_path) {
2315 res.code = 404;
2316 res.add_header("Content-Type", "application/json");
2317 res.body = make_error_json("NOT_FOUND", "Instance not found");
2318 return res;
2319 }
2320
2321 // Parse rendering parameters
2322 auto accept = req.get_header_value("Accept");
2323 auto params = dicomweb::parse_rendered_params(req.raw_url, accept);
2324
2325 // Render image
2326 auto result = dicomweb::render_dicom_image(*file_path, params);
2327
2328 if (!result.success) {
2329 res.code = 400;
2330 res.add_header("Content-Type", "application/json");
2331 res.body = make_error_json("RENDER_ERROR", result.error_message);
2332 return res;
2333 }
2334
2335 res.code = 200;
2336 res.add_header("Content-Type", result.content_type);
2337 res.body = std::string(
2338 reinterpret_cast<char*>(result.data.data()),
2339 result.data.size());
2340 return res;
2341 });
2342
2343 // GET /dicomweb/studies/{studyUID}/series/{seriesUID}/instances/{sopUID}/frames/{frameNumber}/rendered
2344 CROW_ROUTE(app,
2345 "/dicomweb/studies/<string>/series/<string>/instances/<string>/frames/<string>/rendered")
2346 .methods(crow::HTTPMethod::GET)(
2347 [ctx](const crow::request& req,
2348 const std::string& study_uid,
2349 const std::string& series_uid,
2350 const std::string& sop_uid,
2351 const std::string& frame_str) {
2352 crow::response res;
2353 add_cors_headers(res, *ctx);
2354
2355 if (!ctx->database) {
2356 res.code = 503;
2357 res.add_header("Content-Type", "application/json");
2358 res.body = make_error_json("DATABASE_UNAVAILABLE",
2359 "Database not configured");
2360 return res;
2361 }
2362
2363 auto file_path_result = ctx->database->get_file_path(sop_uid);
2364 if (!file_path_result.is_ok()) {
2365 res.code = 500;
2366 res.add_header("Content-Type", "application/json");
2367 res.body = make_error_json("QUERY_ERROR",
2368 file_path_result.error().message);
2369 return res;
2370 }
2371 const auto& file_path = file_path_result.value();
2372 if (!file_path) {
2373 res.code = 404;
2374 res.add_header("Content-Type", "application/json");
2375 res.body = make_error_json("NOT_FOUND", "Instance not found");
2376 return res;
2377 }
2378
2379 // Parse frame number
2380 uint32_t frame_num = 1;
2381 try {
2382 frame_num = std::stoul(frame_str);
2383 if (frame_num == 0) frame_num = 1;
2384 } catch (...) {
2385 res.code = 400;
2386 res.add_header("Content-Type", "application/json");
2387 res.body = make_error_json("INVALID_FRAME",
2388 "Invalid frame number");
2389 return res;
2390 }
2391
2392 // Parse rendering parameters and set frame
2393 auto accept = req.get_header_value("Accept");
2394 auto params = dicomweb::parse_rendered_params(req.raw_url, accept);
2395 params.frame = frame_num;
2396
2397 // Render image
2398 auto result = dicomweb::render_dicom_image(*file_path, params);
2399
2400 if (!result.success) {
2401 res.code = 400;
2402 res.add_header("Content-Type", "application/json");
2403 res.body = make_error_json("RENDER_ERROR", result.error_message);
2404 return res;
2405 }
2406
2407 res.code = 200;
2408 res.add_header("Content-Type", result.content_type);
2409 res.body = std::string(
2410 reinterpret_cast<char*>(result.data.data()),
2411 result.data.size());
2412 return res;
2413 });
2414
2415 // ========================================================================
2416 // STOW-RS (Store Over the Web)
2417 // ========================================================================
2418
2419 // POST /dicomweb/studies - Store instances (new study)
2420 CROW_ROUTE(app, "/dicomweb/studies")
2421 .methods(crow::HTTPMethod::POST)(
2422 [ctx](const crow::request& req) {
2423 crow::response res;
2424 add_cors_headers(res, *ctx);
2425
2426 // OAuth 2.0 / legacy auth check (write scope)
2427 if (!check_dicomweb_auth(ctx, req, res,
2428 {"dicomweb.write"})) {
2429 return res;
2430 }
2431
2432 if (!ctx->database || !ctx->file_storage) {
2433 res.code = 503;
2434 res.add_header("Content-Type", "application/json");
2435 res.body = make_error_json("SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE",
2436 !ctx->database
2437 ? "Database not configured"
2438 : "File storage not configured");
2439 return res;
2440 }
2441
2442 // Parse Content-Type header
2443 auto content_type = req.get_header_value("Content-Type");
2444 if (content_type.empty() ||
2445 content_type.find("multipart/related") == std::string::npos) {
2446 res.code = 415; // Unsupported Media Type
2447 res.add_header("Content-Type", "application/json");
2448 res.body = make_error_json(
2449 "UNSUPPORTED_MEDIA_TYPE",
2450 "Content-Type must be multipart/related");
2451 return res;
2452 }
2453
2454 // Parse multipart body
2455 auto parse_result = dicomweb::multipart_parser::parse(
2456 content_type, req.body);
2457
2458 if (!parse_result) {
2459 res.code = 400;
2460 res.add_header("Content-Type", "application/json");
2461 res.body = make_error_json(
2462 parse_result.error->code,
2463 parse_result.error->message);
2464 return res;
2465 }
2466
2467 if (parse_result.parts.empty()) {
2468 res.code = 400;
2469 res.add_header("Content-Type", "application/json");
2470 res.body = make_error_json(
2471 "NO_INSTANCES",
2472 "No DICOM instances in request body");
2473 return res;
2474 }
2475
2476 // Process each part
2477 dicomweb::store_response store_response;
2478
2479 for (const auto& part : parse_result.parts) {
2480 dicomweb::store_instance_result result;
2481
2482 // Only process application/dicom parts
2483 if (part.content_type.find("application/dicom") ==
2484 std::string::npos) {
2485 continue;
2486 }
2487
2488 // Parse DICOM from memory
2489 auto dicom_result = core::dicom_file::from_bytes(
2490 std::span<const uint8_t>(part.data.data(), part.data.size()));
2491
2492 if (dicom_result.is_err()) {
2493 result.success = false;
2494 result.error_code = "INVALID_DATA";
2495 result.error_message = "Failed to parse DICOM data";
2496 store_response.failed_instances.push_back(
2497 std::move(result));
2498 continue;
2499 }
2500
2501 const auto& dataset = dicom_result.value().dataset();
2502
2503 // Validate instance
2504 auto validation = dicomweb::validate_instance(dataset);
2505 if (!validation) {
2506 result.success = false;
2507 result.error_code = validation.error_code;
2508 result.error_message = validation.error_message;
2509
2510 // Try to extract UIDs for error reporting
2511 if (auto elem = dataset.get(core::tags::sop_class_uid)) {
2512 result.sop_class_uid = elem->as_string().unwrap_or("");
2513 }
2514 if (auto elem = dataset.get(core::tags::sop_instance_uid)) {
2515 result.sop_instance_uid = elem->as_string().unwrap_or("");
2516 }
2517
2518 store_response.failed_instances.push_back(
2519 std::move(result));
2520 continue;
2521 }
2522
2523 // Extract UIDs
2524 auto sop_class_elem = dataset.get(core::tags::sop_class_uid);
2525 auto sop_instance_elem = dataset.get(core::tags::sop_instance_uid);
2526 auto study_uid_elem = dataset.get(core::tags::study_instance_uid);
2527 auto series_uid_elem = dataset.get(core::tags::series_instance_uid);
2528
2529 result.sop_class_uid = sop_class_elem->as_string().unwrap_or("");
2530 result.sop_instance_uid = sop_instance_elem->as_string().unwrap_or("");
2531
2532 std::string study_uid = study_uid_elem->as_string().unwrap_or("");
2533 std::string series_uid = series_uid_elem->as_string().unwrap_or("");
2534
2535 // Check for duplicate
2536 auto existing_result = ctx->database->get_file_path(
2537 result.sop_instance_uid);
2538 if (existing_result.is_ok() && existing_result.value()) {
2539 result.success = false;
2540 result.error_code = "DUPLICATE";
2541 result.error_message = "Instance already exists";
2542 store_response.failed_instances.push_back(
2543 std::move(result));
2544 continue;
2545 }
2546
2547 // Store instance via file_storage and index in database
2548 if (!store_instance_to_storage(ctx, dataset, result)) {
2549 store_response.failed_instances.push_back(
2550 std::move(result));
2551 continue;
2552 }
2553
2554 result.success = true;
2555 result.retrieve_url = "/dicomweb/studies/" + study_uid +
2556 "/series/" + series_uid +
2557 "/instances/" + result.sop_instance_uid;
2558 store_response.referenced_instances.push_back(
2559 std::move(result));
2560 }
2561
2562 // Build response
2563 std::string base_url; // Empty base URL, client should use relative URLs
2564
2565 res.add_header("Content-Type",
2566 std::string(dicomweb::media_type::dicom_json));
2567
2568 if (store_response.all_failed()) {
2569 res.code = 409; // Conflict
2570 } else if (store_response.partial_success()) {
2571 res.code = 202; // Accepted with warnings
2572 } else {
2573 res.code = 200; // OK
2574 }
2575
2576 res.body = dicomweb::build_store_response_json(
2577 store_response, base_url);
2578 return res;
2579 });
2580
2581 // POST /dicomweb/studies/{studyUID} - Store instances to existing study
2582 CROW_ROUTE(app, "/dicomweb/studies/<string>")
2583 .methods(crow::HTTPMethod::POST)(
2584 [ctx](const crow::request& req, const std::string& target_study_uid) {
2585 crow::response res;
2586 add_cors_headers(res, *ctx);
2587
2588 // OAuth 2.0 / legacy auth check (write scope)
2589 if (!check_dicomweb_auth(ctx, req, res,
2590 {"dicomweb.write"})) {
2591 return res;
2592 }
2593
2594 if (!ctx->database || !ctx->file_storage) {
2595 res.code = 503;
2596 res.add_header("Content-Type", "application/json");
2597 res.body = make_error_json("SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE",
2598 !ctx->database
2599 ? "Database not configured"
2600 : "File storage not configured");
2601 return res;
2602 }
2603
2604 // Parse Content-Type header
2605 auto content_type = req.get_header_value("Content-Type");
2606 if (content_type.empty() ||
2607 content_type.find("multipart/related") == std::string::npos) {
2608 res.code = 415;
2609 res.add_header("Content-Type", "application/json");
2610 res.body = make_error_json(
2611 "UNSUPPORTED_MEDIA_TYPE",
2612 "Content-Type must be multipart/related");
2613 return res;
2614 }
2615
2616 // Parse multipart body
2617 auto parse_result = dicomweb::multipart_parser::parse(
2618 content_type, req.body);
2619
2620 if (!parse_result) {
2621 res.code = 400;
2622 res.add_header("Content-Type", "application/json");
2623 res.body = make_error_json(
2624 parse_result.error->code,
2625 parse_result.error->message);
2626 return res;
2627 }
2628
2629 if (parse_result.parts.empty()) {
2630 res.code = 400;
2631 res.add_header("Content-Type", "application/json");
2632 res.body = make_error_json(
2633 "NO_INSTANCES",
2634 "No DICOM instances in request body");
2635 return res;
2636 }
2637
2638 // Process each part
2639 dicomweb::store_response store_response;
2640
2641 for (const auto& part : parse_result.parts) {
2642 dicomweb::store_instance_result result;
2643
2644 // Only process application/dicom parts
2645 if (part.content_type.find("application/dicom") ==
2646 std::string::npos) {
2647 continue;
2648 }
2649
2650 // Parse DICOM from memory
2651 auto dicom_result = core::dicom_file::from_bytes(
2652 std::span<const uint8_t>(part.data.data(), part.data.size()));
2653
2654 if (dicom_result.is_err()) {
2655 result.success = false;
2656 result.error_code = "INVALID_DATA";
2657 result.error_message = "Failed to parse DICOM data";
2658 store_response.failed_instances.push_back(
2659 std::move(result));
2660 continue;
2661 }
2662
2663 const auto& dataset = dicom_result.value().dataset();
2664
2665 // Validate instance with target study UID check
2666 auto validation = dicomweb::validate_instance(
2667 dataset, target_study_uid);
2668 if (!validation) {
2669 result.success = false;
2670 result.error_code = validation.error_code;
2671 result.error_message = validation.error_message;
2672
2673 if (auto elem = dataset.get(core::tags::sop_class_uid)) {
2674 result.sop_class_uid = elem->as_string().unwrap_or("");
2675 }
2676 if (auto elem = dataset.get(core::tags::sop_instance_uid)) {
2677 result.sop_instance_uid = elem->as_string().unwrap_or("");
2678 }
2679
2680 store_response.failed_instances.push_back(
2681 std::move(result));
2682 continue;
2683 }
2684
2685 // Extract UIDs
2686 auto sop_class_elem = dataset.get(core::tags::sop_class_uid);
2687 auto sop_instance_elem = dataset.get(core::tags::sop_instance_uid);
2688 auto series_uid_elem = dataset.get(core::tags::series_instance_uid);
2689
2690 result.sop_class_uid = sop_class_elem->as_string().unwrap_or("");
2691 result.sop_instance_uid = sop_instance_elem->as_string().unwrap_or("");
2692 std::string series_uid = series_uid_elem->as_string().unwrap_or("");
2693
2694 // Check for duplicate
2695 auto existing_result = ctx->database->get_file_path(
2696 result.sop_instance_uid);
2697 if (existing_result.is_ok() && existing_result.value()) {
2698 result.success = false;
2699 result.error_code = "DUPLICATE";
2700 result.error_message = "Instance already exists";
2701 store_response.failed_instances.push_back(
2702 std::move(result));
2703 continue;
2704 }
2705
2706 // Store instance via file_storage and index in database
2707 if (!store_instance_to_storage(ctx, dataset, result)) {
2708 store_response.failed_instances.push_back(
2709 std::move(result));
2710 continue;
2711 }
2712
2713 result.success = true;
2714 result.retrieve_url = "/dicomweb/studies/" + target_study_uid +
2715 "/series/" + series_uid +
2716 "/instances/" + result.sop_instance_uid;
2717 store_response.referenced_instances.push_back(
2718 std::move(result));
2719 }
2720
2721 // Build response
2722 std::string base_url; // Empty base URL, client should use relative URLs
2723
2724 res.add_header("Content-Type",
2725 std::string(dicomweb::media_type::dicom_json));
2726
2727 if (store_response.all_failed()) {
2728 res.code = 409; // Conflict
2729 } else if (store_response.partial_success()) {
2730 res.code = 202; // Accepted with warnings
2731 } else {
2732 res.code = 200; // OK
2733 }
2734
2735 res.body = dicomweb::build_store_response_json(
2736 store_response, base_url);
2737 return res;
2738 });
2739
2740 // ========================================================================
2741 // QIDO-RS (Query based on ID for DICOM Objects)
2742 // ========================================================================
2743
2744 // GET /dicomweb/studies - Search for studies
2745 CROW_ROUTE(app, "/dicomweb/studies")
2746 .methods(crow::HTTPMethod::GET)(
2747 [ctx](const crow::request& req) {
2748 crow::response res;
2749 add_cors_headers(res, *ctx);
2750 res.add_header("Content-Type",
2751 std::string(dicomweb::media_type::dicom_json));
2752
2753 // OAuth 2.0 / legacy auth check (read or search scope)
2754 if (!check_dicomweb_auth(ctx, req, res,
2755 {"dicomweb.read", "dicomweb.search"})) {
2756 return res;
2757 }
2758
2759 if (!ctx->database) {
2760 res.code = 503;
2761 res.body = make_error_json("DATABASE_UNAVAILABLE",
2762 "Database not configured");
2763 return res;
2764 }
2765
2766 // Parse query parameters
2767 auto query = dicomweb::parse_study_query_params(req.raw_url);
2768
2769 // Set default limit if not specified (prevent unlimited queries)
2770 if (query.limit == 0) {
2771 query.limit = 100;
2772 }
2773
2774 // Execute search
2775 auto studies_result = ctx->database->search_studies(query);
2776 if (!studies_result.is_ok()) {
2777 res.code = 500;
2778 res.body = make_error_json("QUERY_ERROR",
2779 studies_result.error().message);
2780 return res;
2781 }
2782
2783 // Build response
2784 std::ostringstream oss;
2785 oss << "[";
2786
2787 bool first = true;
2788 for (const auto& study : studies_result.value()) {
2789 if (!first) oss << ",";
2790 first = false;
2791
2792 // Get patient info for this study
2793 std::string patient_id;
2794 std::string patient_name;
2795 if (auto patient = ctx->database->find_patient_by_pk(study.patient_pk)) {
2796 patient_id = patient->patient_id;
2797 patient_name = patient->patient_name;
2798 }
2799
2800 oss << dicomweb::study_record_to_dicom_json(
2801 study, patient_id, patient_name);
2802 }
2803
2804 oss << "]";
2805
2806 res.code = 200;
2807 res.body = oss.str();
2808 return res;
2809 });
2810
2811 // GET /dicomweb/series - Search for all series
2812 CROW_ROUTE(app, "/dicomweb/series")
2813 .methods(crow::HTTPMethod::GET)(
2814 [ctx](const crow::request& req) {
2815 crow::response res;
2816 add_cors_headers(res, *ctx);
2817 res.add_header("Content-Type",
2818 std::string(dicomweb::media_type::dicom_json));
2819
2820 if (!ctx->database) {
2821 res.code = 503;
2822 res.body = make_error_json("DATABASE_UNAVAILABLE",
2823 "Database not configured");
2824 return res;
2825 }
2826
2827 // Parse query parameters
2828 auto query = dicomweb::parse_series_query_params(req.raw_url);
2829
2830 // Set default limit if not specified
2831 if (query.limit == 0) {
2832 query.limit = 100;
2833 }
2834
2835 // Execute search
2836 auto series_list_result = ctx->database->search_series(query);
2837 if (!series_list_result.is_ok()) {
2838 res.code = 500;
2839 res.body = make_error_json("QUERY_ERROR",
2840 series_list_result.error().message);
2841 return res;
2842 }
2843
2844 // Build response
2845 std::ostringstream oss;
2846 oss << "[";
2847
2848 bool first = true;
2849 for (const auto& series : series_list_result.value()) {
2850 if (!first) oss << ",";
2851 first = false;
2852
2853 // Get study UID for this series
2854 std::string study_uid;
2855 if (auto study = ctx->database->find_study_by_pk(series.study_pk)) {
2856 study_uid = study->study_uid;
2857 }
2858
2859 oss << dicomweb::series_record_to_dicom_json(series, study_uid);
2860 }
2861
2862 oss << "]";
2863
2864 res.code = 200;
2865 res.body = oss.str();
2866 return res;
2867 });
2868
2869 // GET /dicomweb/instances - Search for all instances
2870 CROW_ROUTE(app, "/dicomweb/instances")
2871 .methods(crow::HTTPMethod::GET)(
2872 [ctx](const crow::request& req) {
2873 crow::response res;
2874 add_cors_headers(res, *ctx);
2875 res.add_header("Content-Type",
2876 std::string(dicomweb::media_type::dicom_json));
2877
2878 if (!ctx->database) {
2879 res.code = 503;
2880 res.body = make_error_json("DATABASE_UNAVAILABLE",
2881 "Database not configured");
2882 return res;
2883 }
2884
2885 // Parse query parameters
2886 auto query = dicomweb::parse_instance_query_params(req.raw_url);
2887
2888 // Set default limit if not specified
2889 if (query.limit == 0) {
2890 query.limit = 100;
2891 }
2892
2893 // Execute search
2894 auto instances_result = ctx->database->search_instances(query);
2895 if (!instances_result.is_ok()) {
2896 res.code = 500;
2897 res.body = make_error_json("QUERY_ERROR",
2898 instances_result.error().message);
2899 return res;
2900 }
2901
2902 // Build response
2903 std::ostringstream oss;
2904 oss << "[";
2905
2906 bool first = true;
2907 for (const auto& instance : instances_result.value()) {
2908 if (!first) oss << ",";
2909 first = false;
2910
2911 // Get series and study UIDs
2912 std::string series_uid;
2913 std::string study_uid;
2914 if (auto series = ctx->database->find_series_by_pk(instance.series_pk)) {
2915 series_uid = series->series_uid;
2916 if (auto study = ctx->database->find_study_by_pk(series->study_pk)) {
2917 study_uid = study->study_uid;
2918 }
2919 }
2920
2921 oss << dicomweb::instance_record_to_dicom_json(
2922 instance, series_uid, study_uid);
2923 }
2924
2925 oss << "]";
2926
2927 res.code = 200;
2928 res.body = oss.str();
2929 return res;
2930 });
2931
2932 // GET /dicomweb/studies/{studyUID}/series - Search series in a study (QIDO-RS)
2933 CROW_ROUTE(app, "/dicomweb/studies/<string>/series")
2934 .methods(crow::HTTPMethod::GET)(
2935 [ctx](const crow::request& req, const std::string& study_uid) {
2936 crow::response res;
2937 add_cors_headers(res, *ctx);
2938 res.add_header("Content-Type",
2939 std::string(dicomweb::media_type::dicom_json));
2940
2941 // OAuth 2.0 / legacy auth check
2942 if (!check_dicomweb_auth(ctx, req, res,
2943 {"dicomweb.read", "dicomweb.search"})) {
2944 return res;
2945 }
2946
2947 if (!ctx->database) {
2948 res.code = 503;
2949 res.body = make_error_json("DATABASE_UNAVAILABLE",
2950 "Database not configured");
2951 return res;
2952 }
2953
2954 // Verify study exists
2955 auto study = ctx->database->find_study(study_uid);
2956 if (!study) {
2957 res.code = 404;
2958 res.body = make_error_json("NOT_FOUND", "Study not found");
2959 return res;
2960 }
2961
2962 // Parse query parameters and add study filter
2963 auto query = dicomweb::parse_series_query_params(req.raw_url);
2964 query.study_uid = study_uid;
2965
2966 // Set default limit if not specified
2967 if (query.limit == 0) {
2968 query.limit = 100;
2969 }
2970
2971 // Execute search
2972 auto series_list_result = ctx->database->search_series(query);
2973 if (!series_list_result.is_ok()) {
2974 res.code = 500;
2975 res.body = make_error_json("QUERY_ERROR",
2976 series_list_result.error().message);
2977 return res;
2978 }
2979
2980 // Build response
2981 std::ostringstream oss;
2982 oss << "[";
2983
2984 bool first = true;
2985 for (const auto& series : series_list_result.value()) {
2986 if (!first) oss << ",";
2987 first = false;
2988
2989 oss << dicomweb::series_record_to_dicom_json(series, study_uid);
2990 }
2991
2992 oss << "]";
2993
2994 res.code = 200;
2995 res.body = oss.str();
2996 return res;
2997 });
2998
2999 // GET /dicomweb/studies/{studyUID}/instances - Search instances in a study (QIDO-RS)
3000 CROW_ROUTE(app, "/dicomweb/studies/<string>/instances")
3001 .methods(crow::HTTPMethod::GET)(
3002 [ctx](const crow::request& req, const std::string& study_uid) {
3003 crow::response res;
3004 add_cors_headers(res, *ctx);
3005 res.add_header("Content-Type",
3006 std::string(dicomweb::media_type::dicom_json));
3007
3008 // OAuth 2.0 / legacy auth check
3009 if (!check_dicomweb_auth(ctx, req, res,
3010 {"dicomweb.read", "dicomweb.search"})) {
3011 return res;
3012 }
3013
3014 if (!ctx->database) {
3015 res.code = 503;
3016 res.body = make_error_json("DATABASE_UNAVAILABLE",
3017 "Database not configured");
3018 return res;
3019 }
3020
3021 // Verify study exists
3022 auto study = ctx->database->find_study(study_uid);
3023 if (!study) {
3024 res.code = 404;
3025 res.body = make_error_json("NOT_FOUND", "Study not found");
3026 return res;
3027 }
3028
3029 // Get all series in this study and then instances
3030 storage::series_query series_query;
3031 series_query.study_uid = study_uid;
3032 auto series_list_result = ctx->database->search_series(series_query);
3033 if (!series_list_result.is_ok()) {
3034 res.code = 500;
3035 res.body = make_error_json("QUERY_ERROR",
3036 series_list_result.error().message);
3037 return res;
3038 }
3039
3040 // Parse query parameters for additional filters
3041 auto inst_query = dicomweb::parse_instance_query_params(req.raw_url);
3042 if (inst_query.limit == 0) {
3043 inst_query.limit = 100;
3044 }
3045
3046 // Collect instances from all series
3047 std::ostringstream oss;
3048 oss << "[";
3049
3050 bool first = true;
3051 size_t count = 0;
3052 size_t skipped = 0;
3053
3054 for (const auto& series : series_list_result.value()) {
3055 if (count >= inst_query.limit) break;
3056
3057 // Search instances in this series
3058 storage::instance_query query;
3059 query.series_uid = series.series_uid;
3060 if (inst_query.sop_uid.has_value()) {
3061 query.sop_uid = inst_query.sop_uid;
3062 }
3063 if (inst_query.sop_class_uid.has_value()) {
3064 query.sop_class_uid = inst_query.sop_class_uid;
3065 }
3066 if (inst_query.instance_number.has_value()) {
3067 query.instance_number = inst_query.instance_number;
3068 }
3069 query.limit = inst_query.limit - count;
3070
3071 auto instances_result = ctx->database->search_instances(query);
3072 if (!instances_result.is_ok()) {
3073 continue;
3074 }
3075 for (const auto& instance : instances_result.value()) {
3076 // Handle offset
3077 if (skipped < inst_query.offset) {
3078 ++skipped;
3079 continue;
3080 }
3081
3082 if (count >= inst_query.limit) break;
3083
3084 if (!first) oss << ",";
3085 first = false;
3086
3087 oss << dicomweb::instance_record_to_dicom_json(
3088 instance, series.series_uid, study_uid);
3089 ++count;
3090 }
3091 }
3092
3093 oss << "]";
3094
3095 res.code = 200;
3096 res.body = oss.str();
3097 return res;
3098 });
3099
3100 // GET /dicomweb/studies/{studyUID}/series/{seriesUID}/instances - Search instances in a series (QIDO-RS)
3101 CROW_ROUTE(app, "/dicomweb/studies/<string>/series/<string>/instances")
3102 .methods(crow::HTTPMethod::GET)(
3103 [ctx](const crow::request& req,
3104 const std::string& study_uid,
3105 const std::string& series_uid) {
3106 crow::response res;
3107 add_cors_headers(res, *ctx);
3108 res.add_header("Content-Type",
3109 std::string(dicomweb::media_type::dicom_json));
3110
3111 // OAuth 2.0 / legacy auth check
3112 if (!check_dicomweb_auth(ctx, req, res,
3113 {"dicomweb.read", "dicomweb.search"})) {
3114 return res;
3115 }
3116
3117 if (!ctx->database) {
3118 res.code = 503;
3119 res.body = make_error_json("DATABASE_UNAVAILABLE",
3120 "Database not configured");
3121 return res;
3122 }
3123
3124 // Verify study exists
3125 auto study = ctx->database->find_study(study_uid);
3126 if (!study) {
3127 res.code = 404;
3128 res.body = make_error_json("NOT_FOUND", "Study not found");
3129 return res;
3130 }
3131
3132 // Verify series exists
3133 auto series = ctx->database->find_series(series_uid);
3134 if (!series) {
3135 res.code = 404;
3136 res.body = make_error_json("NOT_FOUND", "Series not found");
3137 return res;
3138 }
3139
3140 // Parse query parameters and add series filter
3141 auto query = dicomweb::parse_instance_query_params(req.raw_url);
3142 query.series_uid = series_uid;
3143
3144 // Set default limit if not specified
3145 if (query.limit == 0) {
3146 query.limit = 100;
3147 }
3148
3149 // Execute search
3150 auto instances_result = ctx->database->search_instances(query);
3151 if (!instances_result.is_ok()) {
3152 res.code = 500;
3153 res.body = make_error_json("QUERY_ERROR",
3154 instances_result.error().message);
3155 return res;
3156 }
3157
3158 // Build response
3159 std::ostringstream oss;
3160 oss << "[";
3161
3162 bool first = true;
3163 for (const auto& instance : instances_result.value()) {
3164 if (!first) oss << ",";
3165 first = false;
3166
3167 oss << dicomweb::instance_record_to_dicom_json(
3168 instance, series_uid, study_uid);
3169 }
3170
3171 oss << "]";
3172
3173 res.code = 200;
3174 res.body = oss.str();
3175 return res;
3176 });
3177
3178 // ========================================================================
3179 // CORS Preflight Handler for DICOMweb
3180 // ========================================================================
3181
3182 CROW_ROUTE(app, "/dicomweb/<path>")
3183 .methods(crow::HTTPMethod::OPTIONS)(
3184 [ctx](const crow::request& /*req*/, const std::string& /*path*/) {
3185 crow::response res(204);
3186 if (ctx->config) {
3187 res.add_header("Access-Control-Allow-Origin",
3188 ctx->config->cors_allowed_origins);
3189 }
3190 res.add_header("Access-Control-Allow-Methods",
3191 "GET, POST, OPTIONS");
3192 res.add_header("Access-Control-Allow-Headers",
3193 "Content-Type, Accept, Authorization");
3194 res.add_header("Access-Control-Max-Age", "86400");
3195 return res;
3196 });
3197}

470 {
471 // GET /api/v1/jobs - List jobs (paginated with filters)
472 CROW_ROUTE(app, "/api/v1/jobs")
473 .methods(crow::HTTPMethod::GET)([ctx](const crow::request& req) {
474 crow::response res;
475 res.add_header("Content-Type", "application/json");
476 add_cors_headers(res, *ctx);
477
478 if (!ctx->job_manager) {
479 res.code = 503;
480 res.body = make_error_json("SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE",
481 "Job manager not configured");
482 return res;
483 }
484
485 // Parse pagination
486 auto [limit, offset] = parse_pagination(req);
487
488 // Parse filters
489 std::optional<client::job_status> status_filter;
490 std::optional<client::job_type> type_filter;
491
492 auto status_param = req.url_params.get("status");
493 if (status_param) {
494 status_filter = client::job_status_from_string(status_param);
495 }
496
497 auto type_param = req.url_params.get("type");
498 if (type_param) {
499 type_filter = client::job_type_from_string(type_param);
500 }
501
502 // Get jobs with filters
503 auto jobs = ctx->job_manager->list_jobs(status_filter, type_filter,
504 limit, offset);
505
506 // Get total count (without pagination for now, we use jobs.size())
507 // TODO: Add count method to job_manager for accurate total
508 size_t total_count = jobs.size();
509
510 res.code = 200;
511 res.body = jobs_to_json(jobs, total_count);
512 return res;
513 });
514
515 // POST /api/v1/jobs - Create a new job
516 CROW_ROUTE(app, "/api/v1/jobs")
517 .methods(crow::HTTPMethod::POST)([ctx](const crow::request& req) {
518 crow::response res;
519 res.add_header("Content-Type", "application/json");
520 add_cors_headers(res, *ctx);
521
522 if (!ctx->job_manager) {
523 res.code = 503;
524 res.body = make_error_json("SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE",
525 "Job manager not configured");
526 return res;
527 }
528
529 // Parse job type
530 auto type_str = get_json_string_value(req.body, "type");
531 if (type_str.empty()) {
532 res.code = 400;
533 res.body = make_error_json("INVALID_REQUEST", "type is required");
534 return res;
535 }
536
537 auto type = client::job_type_from_string(type_str);
538
539 // Parse priority (optional, defaults to normal)
540 auto priority_str = get_json_string_value(req.body, "priority");
541 auto priority = priority_str.empty()
542 ? client::job_priority::normal
543 : client::job_priority_from_string(priority_str);
544
545 std::string job_id;
546
547 // Create job based on type
548 switch (type) {
549 case client::job_type::retrieve: {
550 auto source_node_id = get_json_string_value(req.body, "source_node_id");
551 auto study_uid = get_json_string_value(req.body, "study_uid");
552
553 if (source_node_id.empty()) {
554 res.code = 400;
555 res.body = make_error_json("INVALID_REQUEST",
556 "source_node_id is required for retrieve job");
557 return res;
558 }
559
560 if (study_uid.empty()) {
561 res.code = 400;
562 res.body = make_error_json("INVALID_REQUEST",
563 "study_uid is required for retrieve job");
564 return res;
565 }
566
567 auto series_uid = get_json_string_value(req.body, "series_uid");
568 std::optional<std::string_view> series_opt;
569 if (!series_uid.empty()) {
570 series_opt = series_uid;
571 }
572
573 job_id = ctx->job_manager->create_retrieve_job(
574 source_node_id, study_uid, series_opt, priority);
575 break;
576 }
577
578 case client::job_type::store: {
579 auto destination_node_id = get_json_string_value(req.body, "destination_node_id");
580 auto instance_uids = get_json_string_array(req.body, "instance_uids");
581
582 if (destination_node_id.empty()) {
583 res.code = 400;
584 res.body = make_error_json("INVALID_REQUEST",
585 "destination_node_id is required for store job");
586 return res;
587 }
588
589 if (instance_uids.empty()) {
590 res.code = 400;
591 res.body = make_error_json("INVALID_REQUEST",
592 "instance_uids is required for store job");
593 return res;
594 }
595
596 job_id = ctx->job_manager->create_store_job(
597 destination_node_id, instance_uids, priority);
598 break;
599 }
600
601 case client::job_type::query: {
602 auto node_id = get_json_string_value(req.body, "node_id");
603 auto query_level = get_json_string_value(req.body, "query_level");
604
605 if (node_id.empty()) {
606 res.code = 400;
607 res.body = make_error_json("INVALID_REQUEST",
608 "node_id is required for query job");
609 return res;
610 }
611
612 if (query_level.empty()) {
613 query_level = "STUDY"; // Default to study level
614 }
615
616 // Parse query keys (simplified - in production use proper JSON parser)
617 std::unordered_map<std::string, std::string> query_keys;
618 auto patient_id = get_json_string_value(req.body, "patient_id");
619 if (!patient_id.empty()) {
620 query_keys["PatientID"] = patient_id;
621 }
622 auto patient_name = get_json_string_value(req.body, "patient_name");
623 if (!patient_name.empty()) {
624 query_keys["PatientName"] = patient_name;
625 }
626
627 job_id = ctx->job_manager->create_query_job(
628 node_id, query_level, query_keys, priority);
629 break;
630 }
631
632 case client::job_type::sync: {
633 auto source_node_id = get_json_string_value(req.body, "source_node_id");
634
635 if (source_node_id.empty()) {
636 res.code = 400;
637 res.body = make_error_json("INVALID_REQUEST",
638 "source_node_id is required for sync job");
639 return res;
640 }
641
642 auto patient_id = get_json_string_value(req.body, "patient_id");
643 std::optional<std::string_view> patient_opt;
644 if (!patient_id.empty()) {
645 patient_opt = patient_id;
646 }
647
648 job_id = ctx->job_manager->create_sync_job(
649 source_node_id, patient_opt, priority);
650 break;
651 }
652
653 case client::job_type::prefetch: {
654 auto source_node_id = get_json_string_value(req.body, "source_node_id");
655 auto patient_id = get_json_string_value(req.body, "patient_id");
656
657 if (source_node_id.empty()) {
658 res.code = 400;
659 res.body = make_error_json("INVALID_REQUEST",
660 "source_node_id is required for prefetch job");
661 return res;
662 }
663
664 if (patient_id.empty()) {
665 res.code = 400;
666 res.body = make_error_json("INVALID_REQUEST",
667 "patient_id is required for prefetch job");
668 return res;
669 }
670
671 job_id = ctx->job_manager->create_prefetch_job(
672 source_node_id, patient_id, priority);
673 break;
674 }
675
676 default: {
677 res.code = 400;
678 res.body = make_error_json("INVALID_REQUEST",
679 "Unsupported job type: " + type_str);
680 return res;
681 }
682 }
683
684 // Retrieve and return the created job
685 auto created_job = ctx->job_manager->get_job(job_id);
686 if (!created_job) {
687 res.code = 201;
688 res.body = R"({"job_id":")" + json_escape(job_id) + R"(","status":"pending"})";
689 return res;
690 }
691
692 res.code = 201;
693 res.body = job_to_json(*created_job);
694 return res;
695 });
696
697 // GET /api/v1/jobs/<jobId> - Get a specific job
698 CROW_ROUTE(app, "/api/v1/jobs/<string>")
699 .methods(crow::HTTPMethod::GET)(
700 [ctx](const crow::request& /*req*/, const std::string& job_id) {
701 crow::response res;
702 res.add_header("Content-Type", "application/json");
703 add_cors_headers(res, *ctx);
704
705 if (!ctx->job_manager) {
706 res.code = 503;
707 res.body = make_error_json("SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE",
708 "Job manager not configured");
709 return res;
710 }
711
712 auto job = ctx->job_manager->get_job(job_id);
713 if (!job) {
714 res.code = 404;
715 res.body = make_error_json("NOT_FOUND", "Job not found");
716 return res;
717 }
718
719 res.code = 200;
720 res.body = job_to_json(*job);
721 return res;
722 });
723
724 // DELETE /api/v1/jobs/<jobId> - Delete a job
725 CROW_ROUTE(app, "/api/v1/jobs/<string>")
726 .methods(crow::HTTPMethod::DELETE)(
727 [ctx](const crow::request& /*req*/, const std::string& job_id) {
728 crow::response res;
729 add_cors_headers(res, *ctx);
730
731 if (!ctx->job_manager) {
732 res.add_header("Content-Type", "application/json");
733 res.code = 503;
734 res.body = make_error_json("SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE",
735 "Job manager not configured");
736 return res;
737 }
738
739 // Check if job exists
740 auto job = ctx->job_manager->get_job(job_id);
741 if (!job) {
742 res.add_header("Content-Type", "application/json");
743 res.code = 404;
744 res.body = make_error_json("NOT_FOUND", "Job not found");
745 return res;
746 }
747
748 auto result = ctx->job_manager->delete_job(job_id);
749 if (!result.is_ok()) {
750 res.add_header("Content-Type", "application/json");
751 res.code = 500;
752 res.body = make_error_json("DELETE_FAILED", result.error().message);
753 return res;
754 }
755
756 res.code = 204;
757 return res;
758 });
759
760 // GET /api/v1/jobs/<jobId>/progress - Get job progress
761 CROW_ROUTE(app, "/api/v1/jobs/<string>/progress")
762 .methods(crow::HTTPMethod::GET)(
763 [ctx](const crow::request& /*req*/, const std::string& job_id) {
764 crow::response res;
765 res.add_header("Content-Type", "application/json");
766 add_cors_headers(res, *ctx);
767
768 if (!ctx->job_manager) {
769 res.code = 503;
770 res.body = make_error_json("SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE",
771 "Job manager not configured");
772 return res;
773 }
774
775 // Check if job exists
776 auto job = ctx->job_manager->get_job(job_id);
777 if (!job) {
778 res.code = 404;
779 res.body = make_error_json("NOT_FOUND", "Job not found");
780 return res;
781 }
782
783 auto progress = ctx->job_manager->get_progress(job_id);
784

786 res.body = progress_to_json(progress);
787 return res;
788 });
789
790 // =========================================================================
791 // Job Control Endpoints (Issue #559)
792 // =========================================================================
793
794 // POST /api/v1/jobs/<jobId>/start - Start a pending job
795 CROW_ROUTE(app, "/api/v1/jobs/<string>/start")
796 .methods(crow::HTTPMethod::POST)(
797 [ctx](const crow::request& /*req*/, const std::string& job_id) {
798 crow::response res;
799 res.add_header("Content-Type", "application/json");
800 add_cors_headers(res, *ctx);
801
802 if (!ctx->job_manager) {
803 res.code = 503;
804 res.body = make_error_json("SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE",
805 "Job manager not configured");
806 return res;
807 }
808
809 // Check if job exists
810 auto job = ctx->job_manager->get_job(job_id);
811 if (!job) {
812 res.code = 404;
813 res.body = make_error_json("NOT_FOUND", "Job not found");
814 return res;
815 }
816
817 auto result = ctx->job_manager->start_job(job_id);
818 if (!result.is_ok()) {
819 res.code = 409;
820 res.body = make_error_json("INVALID_STATE_TRANSITION",
821 result.error().message);
822 return res;
823 }
824
825 // Return updated job
826 auto updated_job = ctx->job_manager->get_job(job_id);
827 if (updated_job) {
828 res.code = 200;
829 res.body = job_to_json(*updated_job);
830 } else {
831 res.code = 200;
832 res.body = R"({"job_id":")" + json_escape(job_id) +
833 R"(","message":"Job started"})";
834 }
835 return res;
836 });
837
838 // POST /api/v1/jobs/<jobId>/pause - Pause a running job
839 CROW_ROUTE(app, "/api/v1/jobs/<string>/pause")
840 .methods(crow::HTTPMethod::POST)(
841 [ctx](const crow::request& /*req*/, const std::string& job_id) {
842 crow::response res;
843 res.add_header("Content-Type", "application/json");
844 add_cors_headers(res, *ctx);
845
846 if (!ctx->job_manager) {
847 res.code = 503;
848 res.body = make_error_json("SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE",
849 "Job manager not configured");
850 return res;
851 }
852
853 // Check if job exists

855 if (!job) {

858 return res;
859 }
860
861 auto result = ctx->job_manager->pause_job(job_id);

865 result.error().message);
866 return res;
867 }
868
869 // Return updated job

871 if (updated_job) {

874 } else {

877 R"(","message":"Job paused"})";
878 }
879 return res;
880 });
881
882 // POST /api/v1/jobs/<jobId>/resume - Resume a paused job
883 CROW_ROUTE(app, "/api/v1/jobs/<string>/resume")
884 .methods(crow::HTTPMethod::POST)(
885 [ctx](const crow::request& /*req*/, const std::string& job_id) {
886 crow::response res;
887 res.add_header("Content-Type", "application/json");
888 add_cors_headers(res, *ctx);
889
890 if (!ctx->job_manager) {
891 res.code = 503;
892 res.body = make_error_json("SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE",
893 "Job manager not configured");
894 return res;
895 }
896
897 // Check if job exists
898 auto job = ctx->job_manager->get_job(job_id);
899 if (!job) {
900 res.code = 404;
901 res.body = make_error_json("NOT_FOUND", "Job not found");
902 return res;
903 }
904
905 auto result = ctx->job_manager->resume_job(job_id);
906 if (!result.is_ok()) {
907 res.code = 409;
908 res.body = make_error_json("INVALID_STATE_TRANSITION",
909 result.error().message);
910 return res;
911 }
912
913 // Return updated job
914 auto updated_job = ctx->job_manager->get_job(job_id);
915 if (updated_job) {
916 res.code = 200;
917 res.body = job_to_json(*updated_job);
918 } else {
919 res.code = 200;
920 res.body = R"({"job_id":")" + json_escape(job_id) +
921 R"(","message":"Job resumed"})";
922 }
923 return res;
924 });
925
926 // POST /api/v1/jobs/<jobId>/cancel - Cancel a job
927 CROW_ROUTE(app, "/api/v1/jobs/<string>/cancel")
928 .methods(crow::HTTPMethod::POST)(
929 [ctx](const crow::request& /*req*/, const std::string& job_id) {
930 crow::response res;
931 res.add_header("Content-Type", "application/json");
932 add_cors_headers(res, *ctx);
933
934 if (!ctx->job_manager) {
935 res.code = 503;
936 res.body = make_error_json("SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE",
937 "Job manager not configured");
938 return res;
939 }
940
941 // Check if job exists
942 auto job = ctx->job_manager->get_job(job_id);
943 if (!job) {
944 res.code = 404;
945 res.body = make_error_json("NOT_FOUND", "Job not found");
946 return res;
947 }
948
949 auto result = ctx->job_manager->cancel_job(job_id);
950 if (!result.is_ok()) {
951 res.code = 409;
952 res.body = make_error_json("INVALID_STATE_TRANSITION",
953 result.error().message);
954 return res;
955 }
956
957 // Return updated job
958 auto updated_job = ctx->job_manager->get_job(job_id);
959 if (updated_job) {
960 res.code = 200;
961 res.body = job_to_json(*updated_job);
962 } else {
963 res.code = 200;
964 res.body = R"({"job_id":")" + json_escape(job_id) +
965 R"(","message":"Job cancelled"})";
966 }
967 return res;
968 });
969
970 // POST /api/v1/jobs/<jobId>/retry - Retry a failed job
971 CROW_ROUTE(app, "/api/v1/jobs/<string>/retry")
972 .methods(crow::HTTPMethod::POST)(
973 [ctx](const crow::request& /*req*/, const std::string& job_id) {
974 crow::response res;
975 res.add_header("Content-Type", "application/json");
976 add_cors_headers(res, *ctx);
977
978 if (!ctx->job_manager) {
979 res.code = 503;
980 res.body = make_error_json("SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE",
981 "Job manager not configured");
982 return res;
983 }
984
985 // Check if job exists
986 auto job = ctx->job_manager->get_job(job_id);
987 if (!job) {
988 res.code = 404;
989 res.body = make_error_json("NOT_FOUND", "Job not found");
990 return res;
991 }
992
993 auto result = ctx->job_manager->retry_job(job_id);
994 if (!result.is_ok()) {
995 res.code = 409;
996 res.body = make_error_json("INVALID_STATE_TRANSITION",
997 result.error().message);
998 return res;
999 }
1000
1001 // Return updated job
1002 auto updated_job = ctx->job_manager->get_job(job_id);
1003 if (updated_job) {
1004 res.code = 200;
1005 res.body = job_to_json(*updated_job);
1006 } else {
1007 res.code = 200;
1008 res.body = R"({"job_id":")" + json_escape(job_id) +
1009 R"(","message":"Job retry queued"})";
1010 }
1011 return res;
1012 });
1013
1014 // =========================================================================
1015 // WebSocket Endpoints (Issue #560)
1016 // =========================================================================
1017
1018 // Register job_manager callbacks for broadcasting (only once)
1019 if (ctx->job_manager && !g_callbacks_registered.exchange(true)) {
1020 // Progress callback - broadcasts to all subscribers
1021 ctx->job_manager->set_progress_callback(
1022 [](const std::string& job_id, const client::job_progress& progress) {
1023 auto message = make_progress_message(job_id, progress);
1024 ws_subscriber_state::instance().broadcast_progress(job_id, message);
1025 });
1026
1027 // Completion callback - broadcasts final status
1028 ctx->job_manager->set_completion_callback(
1029 [](const std::string& job_id, const client::job_record& record) {
1030 auto message = make_completion_message(job_id, record);
1031 ws_subscriber_state::instance().broadcast_progress(job_id, message);
1032 });
1033 }
1034
1035 // WS /api/v1/jobs/<jobId>/progress/stream - Stream progress for specific job
1036 // Note: URL parameters in WebSocket routes require using onaccept to extract
1037 // the job_id from the request URL and store it in userdata
1038 CROW_WEBSOCKET_ROUTE(app, "/api/v1/jobs/<string>/progress/stream")
1039 .onaccept([ctx](const crow::request& req, void** userdata) -> bool {
1040 // Extract job_id from URL: /api/v1/jobs/{job_id}/progress/stream
1041 std::string url = req.url;
1042 // Find the job_id between /jobs/ and /progress
1043 const std::string prefix = "/api/v1/jobs/";
1044 const std::string suffix = "/progress/stream";
1045
1046 if (url.find(prefix) != 0) {
1047 return false;
1048 }
1049
1050 auto suffix_pos = url.rfind(suffix);
1051 if (suffix_pos == std::string::npos) {
1052 return false;
1053 }
1054
1055 std::string job_id = url.substr(prefix.length(),
1056 suffix_pos - prefix.length());
1057
1058 if (job_id.empty()) {
1059 return false;
1060 }
1061
1062 // Verify job manager is available
1063 if (!ctx->job_manager) {
1064 return false;
1065 }
1066
1067 // Verify job exists
1068 auto job = ctx->job_manager->get_job(job_id);
1069 if (!job) {
1070 return false;
1071 }
1072
1073 // Store job_id in userdata (allocate on heap)
1074 *userdata = new std::string(job_id);
1075 return true;
1076 })
1077 .onopen([ctx](crow::websocket::connection& conn) {
1078 auto* job_id_ptr = static_cast<std::string*>(conn.userdata());
1079 if (!job_id_ptr || !ctx->job_manager) {
1080 conn.send_text(R"({"error":"Invalid connection state"})");
1081 conn.close("Invalid state");
1082 return;
1083 }
1084
1085 const std::string& job_id = *job_id_ptr;
1086
1087 // Subscribe to job updates
1088 ws_subscriber_state::instance().add_job_subscriber(job_id, &conn);
1089
1090 // Send initial progress
1091 auto progress = ctx->job_manager->get_progress(job_id);
1092 conn.send_text(make_progress_message(job_id, progress));
1093 })
1094 .onclose([](crow::websocket::connection& conn,
1095 const std::string& /*reason*/, uint16_t /*code*/) {
1096 auto* job_id_ptr = static_cast<std::string*>(conn.userdata());
1097 if (job_id_ptr) {
1098 ws_subscriber_state::instance().remove_job_subscriber(*job_id_ptr, &conn);
1099 delete job_id_ptr;
1100 conn.userdata(nullptr);
1101 }
1102 })
1103 .onmessage([](crow::websocket::connection& /*conn*/,
1104 const std::string& /*data*/, bool /*is_binary*/) {
1105 // Client messages not expected, but handle gracefully
1106 });
1107
1108 // WS /api/v1/jobs/stream - Stream all job updates
1109 CROW_WEBSOCKET_ROUTE(app, "/api/v1/jobs/stream")
1110 .onaccept([ctx](const crow::request& /*req*/, void** /*userdata*/) -> bool {
1111 // Only accept if job_manager is available
1112 return ctx->job_manager != nullptr;
1113 })
1114 .onopen([](crow::websocket::connection& conn) {
1115 // Subscribe to all job updates
1116 ws_subscriber_state::instance().add_all_jobs_subscriber(&conn);
1117
1118 // Send initial connected message
1119 conn.send_text(R"({"type":"connected","message":"Subscribed to all job updates"})");
1120 })
1121 .onclose([](crow::websocket::connection& conn,
1122 const std::string& /*reason*/, uint16_t /*code*/) {
1123 ws_subscriber_state::instance().remove_all_jobs_subscriber(&conn);
1124 })
1125 .onmessage([](crow::websocket::connection& /*conn*/,
1126 const std::string& /*data*/, bool /*is_binary*/) {
1127 // Client messages not expected, but handle gracefully
1128 });
1129}

203
204 if (!ctx->database) {

225 ki.document_title = parse_json_string(body, "document_title");

227

232 }

236#else

238#endif

241 res.code = 500;
242 res.body =
243 make_error_json("SAVE_ERROR", save_result.error().message);
244 return res;
245 }
246
247 res.code = 201;
248 std::ostringstream oss;
249 oss << R"({"key_image_id":")" << json_escape(ki.key_image_id)
250 << R"(","created_at":")" << format_timestamp(ki.created_at)
251 << R"("})";
252 res.body = oss.str();
253 return res;
254 });

256 // GET /api/v1/studies/<studyUid>/key-images - List key images for study
257 CROW_ROUTE(app, "/api/v1/studies/<string>/key-images")
258 .methods(crow::HTTPMethod::GET)(
259 [ctx](const crow::request & /*req*/, const std::string &study_uid) {
260 crow::response res;
261 res.add_header("Content-Type", "application/json");
262 add_cors_headers(res, *ctx);
263
264 if (!ctx->database) {
265 res.code = 503;
266 res.body =
267 make_error_json("DATABASE_UNAVAILABLE", "Database not configured");
268 return res;
269 }
270
271#ifdef PACS_WITH_DATABASE_SYSTEM
272 storage::key_image_repository repo(ctx->database->db_adapter());
273 auto key_images_result = repo.find_by_study(study_uid);
274 if (!key_images_result.is_ok()) {
275 res.code = 500;
276 res.body = make_error_json("QUERY_ERROR", key_images_result.error().message);
277 return res;
278 }
279 res.code = 200;
280 res.body = key_images_to_json(key_images_result.value());
281#else
282 storage::key_image_repository repo(ctx->database->native_handle());
283 auto key_images = repo.find_by_study(study_uid);
284 res.code = 200;
285 res.body = key_images_to_json(key_images);
286#endif
287 return res;
288 });
289

291 CROW_ROUTE(app, "/api/v1/key-images/<string>")
292 .methods(crow::HTTPMethod::DELETE)(
293 [ctx](const crow::request & /*req*/, const std::string &key_image_id) {
294 crow::response res;
295 add_cors_headers(res, *ctx);
296
297 if (!ctx->database) {
298 res.code = 503;
299 res.add_header("Content-Type", "application/json");
300 res.body = make_error_json("DATABASE_UNAVAILABLE",

304
305#ifdef PACS_WITH_DATABASE_SYSTEM

309 res.code = 500;
310 res.add_header("Content-Type", "application/json");
311 res.body = make_error_json("QUERY_ERROR", exists_result.error().message);
312 return res;
313 }
314 if (!exists_result.value()) {
315 res.code = 404;
316 res.add_header("Content-Type", "application/json");
317 res.body = make_error_json("NOT_FOUND", "Key image not found");
318 return res;
319 }
320#else
321 storage::key_image_repository repo(ctx->database->native_handle());
322 if (!repo.exists(key_image_id)) {
323 res.code = 404;
324 res.add_header("Content-Type", "application/json");
325 res.body = make_error_json("NOT_FOUND", "Key image not found");
326 return res;
327 }
328#endif
329
330 auto remove_result = repo.remove(key_image_id);
331 if (!remove_result.is_ok()) {
332 res.code = 500;
333 res.add_header("Content-Type", "application/json");
334 res.body =
335 make_error_json("DELETE_ERROR", remove_result.error().message);
336 return res;
337 }
338
339 res.code = 204;
340 return res;
341 });
342
343 // POST /api/v1/studies/<studyUid>/key-images/export-sr - Export as Key Object Selection SR
344 CROW_ROUTE(app, "/api/v1/studies/<string>/key-images/export-sr")
345 .methods(crow::HTTPMethod::POST)(
346 [ctx](const crow::request & /*req*/, const std::string &study_uid) {
347 crow::response res;
348 add_cors_headers(res, *ctx);
349
350 if (!ctx->database) {
351 res.code = 503;
352 res.add_header("Content-Type", "application/json");
353 res.body = make_error_json("DATABASE_UNAVAILABLE",
354 "Database not configured");
355 return res;
356 }
357
358#ifdef PACS_WITH_DATABASE_SYSTEM
359 storage::key_image_repository repo(ctx->database->db_adapter());
360 auto key_images_result = repo.find_by_study(study_uid);
361 if (!key_images_result.is_ok()) {
362 res.code = 500;
363 res.add_header("Content-Type", "application/json");
364 res.body = make_error_json("QUERY_ERROR", key_images_result.error().message);
365 return res;
366 }
367 const auto& key_images = key_images_result.value();
368#else
369 storage::key_image_repository repo(ctx->database->native_handle());
370 auto key_images = repo.find_by_study(study_uid);
371#endif
372 if (key_images.empty()) {
373 res.code = 404;
374 res.add_header("Content-Type", "application/json");
375 res.body = make_error_json("NO_KEY_IMAGES",
376 "No key images found for study");
377 return res;
378 }
379
380 // Build Key Object Selection Document as JSON
381 // Note: Full DICOM SR encoding requires dcmtk/dicom_dataset integration
382 // This endpoint returns a structured JSON that can be converted to DICOM SR
383 std::ostringstream oss;
384 oss << R"({"document_type":"Key Object Selection",)";
385 oss << R"("study_uid":")" << json_escape(study_uid) << R"(",)";
386 oss << R"("document_title":"Key Images",)";
387 oss << R"("referenced_instances":[)";
388
389 for (size_t i = 0; i < key_images.size(); ++i) {
390 if (i > 0) {
391 oss << ",";
392 }
393 const auto &ki = key_images[i];
394 oss << R"({"sop_instance_uid":")" << json_escape(ki.sop_instance_uid) << R"(",)";
395 oss << R"("frame_number":)";
396 if (ki.frame_number.has_value()) {
397 oss << ki.frame_number.value();
398 } else {
399 oss << "null";
400 }
401 oss << R"(,"reason":")" << json_escape(ki.reason) << R"("})";
402 }
403
404 oss << R"(],"created_at":")" << format_timestamp(std::chrono::system_clock::now()) << R"("})";
405
406 res.code = 200;
407 res.add_header("Content-Type", "application/json");
408 res.body = oss.str();
409 return res;
410 });
411}

289 crow::response res;
290 res.add_header("Content-Type", "application/json");

293 if (!ctx->database) {
294 res.code = 503;

304 return res;
305 }
306
307 storage::measurement_record meas;
308 meas.measurement_id = generate_uuid();
309 meas.sop_instance_uid = parse_json_string(body, "sop_instance_uid");
310 meas.frame_number = parse_json_int(body, "frame_number");
311 meas.user_id = parse_json_string(body, "user_id");
312
313 auto type_str = parse_json_string(body, "measurement_type");

327

346 }

348 res.code = 201;

351 << R"(","value":)" << meas.value << R"(,"unit":")"
352 << json_escape(meas.unit) << R"("})";
