357 // GET /api/v1/measurements - List measurements
358 CROW_ROUTE(app, "/api/v1/measurements")
359 .methods(crow::HTTPMethod::GET)([ctx](const crow::request &req) {
360 crow::response res;
361 res.add_header("Content-Type", "application/json");
362 add_cors_headers(res, *ctx);
363
364 if (!ctx->database) {
365 res.code = 503;
366 res.body =
367 make_error_json("DATABASE_UNAVAILABLE", "Database not configured");
368 return res;
369 }
370
371 auto [limit, offset] = parse_pagination(req);
372
373 storage::measurement_query query;
374 query.limit = limit;
375 query.offset = offset;
376
377 auto sop_instance_uid = req.url_params.get("sop_instance_uid");
378 if (sop_instance_uid) {
379 query.sop_instance_uid = sop_instance_uid;
380 }
381 auto study_uid = req.url_params.get("study_uid");
382 if (study_uid) {
383 query.study_uid = study_uid;
384 }
385 auto user_id = req.url_params.get("user_id");
386 if (user_id) {
387 query.user_id = user_id;
388 }
389 auto measurement_type = req.url_params.get("measurement_type");
390 if (measurement_type) {
391 auto type_opt = storage::measurement_type_from_string(measurement_type);
392 if (type_opt.has_value()) {
393 query.type = type_opt.value();
394 }
395 }
396
397#ifdef PACS_WITH_DATABASE_SYSTEM
398 storage::measurement_repository repo(ctx->database->db_adapter());
399
400 storage::measurement_query count_query = query;
401 count_query.limit = 0;
402 count_query.offset = 0;
403 auto count_result = repo.count(count_query);
404 if (!count_result.is_ok()) {
405 res.code = 500;
406 res.body = make_error_json("COUNT_ERROR", count_result.error().message);
407 return res;
408 }
409 size_t total_count = count_result.value();
410
411 auto measurements_result = repo.search(query);
412 if (!measurements_result.is_ok()) {
413 res.code = 500;
414 res.body = make_error_json("QUERY_ERROR", measurements_result.error().message);
415 return res;
416 }
417 res.code = 200;
418 res.body = measurements_to_json(measurements_result.value(), total_count);
419#else
420 storage::measurement_repository repo(ctx->database->native_handle());
421
422 storage::measurement_query count_query = query;
423 count_query.limit = 0;
424 count_query.offset = 0;
425 size_t total_count = repo.count(count_query);
426
427 auto measurements = repo.search(query);
428 res.code = 200;
429 res.body = measurements_to_json(measurements, total_count);
430#endif
431 return res;
432 });
433
434 // GET /api/v1/measurements/<measurementId> - Get measurement by ID
435 CROW_ROUTE(app, "/api/v1/measurements/<string>")
436 .methods(crow::HTTPMethod::GET)(
437 [ctx](const crow::request & /*req*/, const std::string &measurement_id) {
438 crow::response res;
439 res.add_header("Content-Type", "application/json");
440 add_cors_headers(res, *ctx);
441
442 if (!ctx->database) {
443 res.code = 503;
444 res.body = make_error_json("DATABASE_UNAVAILABLE",
445 "Database not configured");
446 return res;
447 }
448
449#ifdef PACS_WITH_DATABASE_SYSTEM
450 storage::measurement_repository repo(ctx->database->db_adapter());
451 auto meas_result = repo.find_by_id(measurement_id);
452 if (!meas_result.is_ok()) {
453 // Check if it's a NOT_FOUND error
454 if (meas_result.error().message.find("not found") != std::string::npos ||
455 meas_result.error().message.find("NOT_FOUND") != std::string::npos) {
456 res.code = 404;
457 res.body = make_error_json("NOT_FOUND", "Measurement not found");
458 } else {
459 res.code = 500;
460 res.body = make_error_json("QUERY_ERROR", meas_result.error().message);
461 }
462 return res;
463 }
464 res.code = 200;
465 res.body = measurement_to_json(meas_result.value());
466#else
467 storage::measurement_repository repo(ctx->database->native_handle());
468 auto meas_result = repo.find_by_id(measurement_id);
469 if (!meas_result.has_value()) {
470 res.code = 404;
471 res.body = make_error_json("NOT_FOUND", "Measurement not found");
472 return res;
473 }
474 res.code = 200;
475 res.body = measurement_to_json(meas_result.value());
476#endif
477 return res;
478 });
479
480 // DELETE /api/v1/measurements/<measurementId> - Delete measurement
481 CROW_ROUTE(app, "/api/v1/measurements/<string>")
482 .methods(crow::HTTPMethod::DELETE)(
483 [ctx](const crow::request & /*req*/, const std::string &measurement_id) {
484 crow::response res;
485 add_cors_headers(res, *ctx);
486
487 if (!ctx->database) {
488 res.code = 503;
489 res.add_header("Content-Type", "application/json");
490 res.body = make_error_json("DATABASE_UNAVAILABLE",
491 "Database not configured");
492 return res;
493 }
494
495#ifdef PACS_WITH_DATABASE_SYSTEM
496 storage::measurement_repository repo(ctx->database->db_adapter());
497 auto exists_result = repo.exists(measurement_id);
498 if (!exists_result.is_ok()) {
499 res.code = 500;
500 res.add_header("Content-Type", "application/json");
501 res.body = make_error_json("QUERY_ERROR", exists_result.error().message);
502 return res;
503 }
504 if (!exists_result.value()) {
505 res.code = 404;
506 res.add_header("Content-Type", "application/json");
507 res.body = make_error_json("NOT_FOUND", "Measurement not found");
508 return res;
509 }
510#else
511 storage::measurement_repository repo(ctx->database->native_handle());
512 if (!repo.exists(measurement_id)) {
513 res.code = 404;
514 res.add_header("Content-Type", "application/json");
515 res.body = make_error_json("NOT_FOUND", "Measurement not found");
516 return res;
517 }
518#endif
519
520 auto remove_result = repo.remove(measurement_id);
521 if (!remove_result.is_ok()) {
522 res.code = 500;
523 res.add_header("Content-Type", "application/json");
524 res.body =
525 make_error_json("DELETE_ERROR", remove_result.error().message);
526 return res;
527 }
528
529 res.code = 204;
530 return res;
531 });
532
533 // GET /api/v1/instances/<sopInstanceUid>/measurements - Get measurements for instance
534 CROW_ROUTE(app, "/api/v1/instances/<string>/measurements")
535 .methods(crow::HTTPMethod::GET)(
536 [ctx](const crow::request & /*req*/,
537 const std::string &sop_instance_uid) {
538 crow::response res;
539 res.add_header("Content-Type", "application/json");
540 add_cors_headers(res, *ctx);
541
542 if (!ctx->database) {
543 res.code = 503;
544 res.body = make_error_json("DATABASE_UNAVAILABLE",
545 "Database not configured");
546 return res;
547 }
548
549#ifdef PACS_WITH_DATABASE_SYSTEM
550 storage::measurement_repository repo(ctx->database->db_adapter());
551 auto measurements_result = repo.find_by_instance(sop_instance_uid);
552 if (!measurements_result.is_ok()) {
553 res.code = 500;
554 res.body = make_error_json("QUERY_ERROR", measurements_result.error().message);
555 return res;
556 }
557 const auto& measurements = measurements_result.value();
558#else
559 storage::measurement_repository repo(ctx->database->native_handle());
560 auto measurements = repo.find_by_instance(sop_instance_uid);
561#endif
562
563 std::ostringstream oss;
564 oss << R"({"data":[)";
565 for (size_t i = 0; i < measurements.size(); ++i) {
566 if (i > 0) {
567 oss << ",";
568 }
569 oss << measurement_to_json(measurements[i]);
570 }
571 oss << "]}";
572
573 res.code = 200;
574 res.body = oss.str();
575 return res;
576 });
577}

241 patients_result.error().message);
242 return res;
243 }
244
245 res.code = 200;

313 crow::response res;
314 res.add_header("Content-Type", "application/json");
315 add_cors_headers(res, *ctx);
316
317 if (!ctx->node_manager) {
318 res.code = 503;
319 res.body = make_error_json("SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE",

321 return res;
322 }
323
324 // Parse pagination
325 auto [limit, offset] = parse_pagination(req);
326
327 // Filter by status if provided
328 auto status_param = req.url_params.get("status");

330
331 if (status_param) {
332 auto status = client::node_status_from_string(status_param);
333 nodes = ctx->node_manager->list_nodes_by_status(status);
334 } else {
335 nodes = ctx->node_manager->list_nodes();
336 }
337
338 size_t total_count = nodes.size();
339
340 // Apply pagination

343 paginated.push_back(nodes[i]);
344 }

346 res.code = 200;
347 res.body = nodes_to_json(paginated, total_count);
348 return res;

351 // POST /api/v1/remote-nodes - Create a new remote node
352 CROW_ROUTE(app, "/api/v1/remote-nodes")
353 .methods(crow::HTTPMethod::POST)([ctx](const crow::request& req) {
354 crow::response res;
355 res.add_header("Content-Type", "application/json");
356 add_cors_headers(res, *ctx);
357
358 if (!ctx->node_manager) {
359 res.code = 503;
360 res.body = make_error_json("SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE",
361 "Remote node manager not configured");
362 return res;
363 }
364
365 std::string error_message;
366 auto node_opt = parse_node_from_json(req.body, error_message);
367 if (!node_opt) {
368 res.code = 400;
369 res.body = make_error_json("INVALID_REQUEST", error_message);
370 return res;
371 }
372
373 auto& node = *node_opt;
374
375 // Generate node_id if not provided
376 if (node.node_id.empty()) {
377 // Use ae_title + timestamp as default node_id
378 auto now = std::chrono::system_clock::now();
379 auto ms = std::chrono::duration_cast<std::chrono::milliseconds>(
380 now.time_since_epoch()).count();
381 node.node_id = node.ae_title + "_" + std::to_string(ms);
382 }
383
384 auto result = ctx->node_manager->add_node(node);
385 if (!result.is_ok()) {
386 res.code = 409;
387 res.body = make_error_json("CONFLICT", result.error().message);
388 return res;
389 }
390
391 // Retrieve the created node to get full details
392 auto created_node = ctx->node_manager->get_node(node.node_id);
393 if (!created_node) {
394 res.code = 201;
395 res.body = node_to_json(node);
396 return res;
397 }
398
399 res.code = 201;
400 res.body = node_to_json(*created_node);
401 return res;
402 });
403
404 // GET /api/v1/remote-nodes/<nodeId> - Get a specific remote node
405 CROW_ROUTE(app, "/api/v1/remote-nodes/<string>")
406 .methods(crow::HTTPMethod::GET)(
407 [ctx](const crow::request& /*req*/, const std::string& node_id) {
408 crow::response res;
409 res.add_header("Content-Type", "application/json");
410 add_cors_headers(res, *ctx);
411
412 if (!ctx->node_manager) {
413 res.code = 503;
414 res.body = make_error_json("SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE",
415 "Remote node manager not configured");
416 return res;
417 }
418
419 auto node = ctx->node_manager->get_node(node_id);
420 if (!node) {
421 res.code = 404;
422 res.body = make_error_json("NOT_FOUND", "Remote node not found");
423 return res;
424 }
425
426 res.code = 200;
427 res.body = node_to_json(*node);
428 return res;
429 });
430
431 // PUT /api/v1/remote-nodes/<nodeId> - Update a remote node
432 CROW_ROUTE(app, "/api/v1/remote-nodes/<string>")
433 .methods(crow::HTTPMethod::PUT)(
434 [ctx](const crow::request& req, const std::string& node_id) {
435 crow::response res;
436 res.add_header("Content-Type", "application/json");
437 add_cors_headers(res, *ctx);
438
439 if (!ctx->node_manager) {
440 res.code = 503;
441 res.body = make_error_json("SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE",
442 "Remote node manager not configured");
443 return res;
444 }
445
446 // Check if node exists
447 auto existing = ctx->node_manager->get_node(node_id);
448 if (!existing) {
449 res.code = 404;
450 res.body = make_error_json("NOT_FOUND", "Remote node not found");
451 return res;
452 }
453
454 std::string error_message;
455 auto node_opt = parse_node_from_json(req.body, error_message);
456 if (!node_opt) {
457 res.code = 400;
458 res.body = make_error_json("INVALID_REQUEST", error_message);
459 return res;
460 }
461
462 auto& node = *node_opt;
463 node.node_id = node_id; // Preserve the node_id from URL
464
465 auto result = ctx->node_manager->update_node(node);
466 if (!result.is_ok()) {
467 res.code = 500;
468 res.body = make_error_json("UPDATE_FAILED", result.error().message);
469 return res;
470 }
471
472 // Retrieve the updated node
473 auto updated_node = ctx->node_manager->get_node(node_id);
474 if (!updated_node) {
475 res.code = 200;
476 res.body = node_to_json(node);
477 return res;
478 }
479
480 res.code = 200;
481 res.body = node_to_json(*updated_node);
482 return res;
483 });
484
485 // DELETE /api/v1/remote-nodes/<nodeId> - Delete a remote node
486 CROW_ROUTE(app, "/api/v1/remote-nodes/<string>")
487 .methods(crow::HTTPMethod::DELETE)(
488 [ctx](const crow::request& /*req*/, const std::string& node_id) {
489 crow::response res;
490 add_cors_headers(res, *ctx);
491
492 if (!ctx->node_manager) {
493 res.add_header("Content-Type", "application/json");
494 res.code = 503;
495 res.body = make_error_json("SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE",
496 "Remote node manager not configured");
497 return res;
498 }
499
500 // Check if node exists
501 auto existing = ctx->node_manager->get_node(node_id);
502 if (!existing) {
503 res.add_header("Content-Type", "application/json");
504 res.code = 404;
505 res.body = make_error_json("NOT_FOUND", "Remote node not found");
506 return res;
507 }
508
509 auto result = ctx->node_manager->remove_node(node_id);
510 if (!result.is_ok()) {
511 res.add_header("Content-Type", "application/json");
512 res.code = 500;
513 res.body = make_error_json("DELETE_FAILED", result.error().message);
514 return res;
515 }
516
517 res.code = 204;
518 return res;
519 });
520
521 // POST /api/v1/remote-nodes/<nodeId>/verify - Verify node connectivity
522 CROW_ROUTE(app, "/api/v1/remote-nodes/<string>/verify")
523 .methods(crow::HTTPMethod::POST)(
524 [ctx](const crow::request& /*req*/, const std::string& node_id) {
525 crow::response res;
526 res.add_header("Content-Type", "application/json");
527 add_cors_headers(res, *ctx);
528
529 if (!ctx->node_manager) {
530 res.code = 503;
531 res.body = make_error_json("SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE",
532 "Remote node manager not configured");
533 return res;
534 }
535
536 // Check if node exists
537 auto existing = ctx->node_manager->get_node(node_id);
538 if (!existing) {
539 res.code = 404;
540 res.body = make_error_json("NOT_FOUND", "Remote node not found");
541 return res;
542 }
543
544 auto start = std::chrono::steady_clock::now();
545 auto result = ctx->node_manager->verify_node(node_id);
546 auto end = std::chrono::steady_clock::now();
547 auto elapsed_ms = std::chrono::duration_cast<std::chrono::milliseconds>(
548 end - start).count();
549
550 if (result.is_ok()) {
551 std::ostringstream oss;
552 oss << R"({"success":true,"response_time_ms":)" << elapsed_ms << '}';
553 res.code = 200;
554 res.body = oss.str();
555 } else {
556 std::ostringstream oss;
557 oss << R"({"success":false,"error":")"
558 << json_escape(result.error().message)
559 << R"(","response_time_ms":)" << elapsed_ms << '}';
560 res.code = 200;
561 res.body = oss.str();
562 }
563 return res;
564 });
565
566 // GET /api/v1/remote-nodes/<nodeId>/status - Get node status
567 CROW_ROUTE(app, "/api/v1/remote-nodes/<string>/status")
568 .methods(crow::HTTPMethod::GET)(
569 [ctx](const crow::request& /*req*/, const std::string& node_id) {
570 crow::response res;
571 res.add_header("Content-Type", "application/json");
572 add_cors_headers(res, *ctx);
573
574 if (!ctx->node_manager) {
575 res.code = 503;
576 res.body = make_error_json("SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE",
577 "Remote node manager not configured");
578 return res;
579 }
580
581 auto node = ctx->node_manager->get_node(node_id);
582 if (!node) {
583 res.code = 404;
584 res.body = make_error_json("NOT_FOUND", "Remote node not found");
585 return res;
586 }
587
588 auto stats = ctx->node_manager->get_statistics(node_id);
589
590 std::ostringstream oss;
591 oss << R"({"status":")" << client::to_string(node->status) << '"';
592
593 auto last_verified = format_timestamp(node->last_verified);
594 if (!last_verified.empty()) {
595 oss << R"(,"last_verified":")" << last_verified << '"';
596 }
597
598 if (!node->last_error_message.empty()) {
599 oss << R"(,"last_error_message":")"
600 << json_escape(node->last_error_message) << '"';
601 }
602
603 oss << R"(,"total_connections":)" << stats.total_connections
604 << R"(,"active_connections":)" << stats.active_connections
605 << R"(,"successful_operations":)" << stats.successful_operations
606 << R"(,"failed_operations":)" << stats.failed_operations;
607
608 if (stats.avg_response_time.count() > 0) {
609 oss << R"(,"avg_response_time_ms":)" << stats.avg_response_time.count();
610 }
611
612 oss << '}';
613
614 res.code = 200;
615 res.body = oss.str();
616 return res;
617 });
618
619 // POST /api/v1/remote-nodes/<nodeId>/query - Query remote PACS
620 CROW_ROUTE(app, "/api/v1/remote-nodes/<string>/query")
621 .methods(crow::HTTPMethod::POST)(
622 [ctx](const crow::request& req, const std::string& node_id) {
623 crow::response res;
624 res.add_header("Content-Type", "application/json");
625 add_cors_headers(res, *ctx);
626
627 if (!ctx->node_manager) {
628 res.code = 503;
629 res.body = make_error_json("SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE",
630 "Remote node manager not configured");
631 return res;
632 }
633
634 auto node = ctx->node_manager->get_node(node_id);
635 if (!node) {
636 res.code = 404;
637 res.body = make_error_json("NOT_FOUND", "Remote node not found");
638 return res;
639 }
640
641 if (!node->supports_find) {
642 res.code = 400;
643 res.body = make_error_json("UNSUPPORTED",
644 "Remote node does not support C-FIND queries");
645 return res;
646 }
647
648 // Parse query parameters from request body
649 auto get_str = [&req](const std::string& key) -> std::string {
650 std::string search = "\"" + key + "\":\"";
651 auto pos = req.body.find(search);
652 if (pos == std::string::npos) return "";
653 pos += search.length();
654 auto end_pos = req.body.find('"', pos);
655 if (end_pos == std::string::npos) return "";
656 return req.body.substr(pos, end_pos - pos);
657 };
658
659 auto level = get_str("level");
660 if (level.empty()) level = "STUDY";
661
662 // Determine calling AE title from dicom_server config
663 std::string calling_ae = "PACS_SCU";
664 if (ctx->dicom_server) {
665 calling_ae = ctx->dicom_server->config().ae_title;
666 }
667
668 // Build association config for C-FIND
669 network::association_config assoc_config;
670 assoc_config.calling_ae_title = calling_ae;
671 assoc_config.called_ae_title = node->ae_title;
672 assoc_config.proposed_contexts.push_back({
673 1,
674 std::string(services::study_root_find_sop_class_uid),
675 {"1.2.840.10008.1.2.1"} // Explicit VR Little Endian
676 });
677
678 auto timeout = std::chrono::milliseconds(
679 node->connection_timeout.count() * 1000);
680 auto assoc_result = network::association::connect(
681 node->host,
682 static_cast<uint16_t>(node->port),
683 assoc_config,
684 timeout);
685
686 if (assoc_result.is_err()) {
687 res.code = 502;
688 res.body = make_error_json("CONNECTION_FAILED",
689 "Failed to connect to remote PACS: " +
690 assoc_result.error().message);
691 return res;
692 }
693
694 auto& assoc = assoc_result.value();
695 services::query_scu scu;
696
697 // Helper to format query results as JSON
698 auto format_query_response = [](
699 const services::query_result& qr) -> std::string {
700 std::ostringstream oss;
701 oss << R"({"matches":[)";
702 for (size_t i = 0; i < qr.matches.size(); ++i) {
703 if (i > 0) oss << ',';
704 oss << '{';
705 bool first_field = true;
706 for (const auto& [tag, element] : qr.matches[i]) {
707 auto val = element.as_string();
708 if (val.is_err()) continue;
709 if (!first_field) oss << ',';
710 first_field = false;
711 oss << '"' << json_escape(tag.to_string())
712 << R"(":")" << json_escape(val.value()) << '"';
713 }
714 oss << '}';
715 }
716 oss << R"(],"total_matches":)" << qr.matches.size()
717 << R"(,"elapsed_ms":)" << qr.elapsed.count()
718 << R"(,"status":")"
719 << (qr.is_success() ? "success" : "error")
720 << R"("})";
721 return oss.str();
722 };
723
724 // Helper to handle query result and build response
725 auto handle_result = [&](
726 network::Result<services::query_result>& result) {
727 (void)assoc.release();
728 if (result.is_err()) {
729 res.code = 502;
730 res.body = make_error_json("QUERY_FAILED",
731 "C-FIND query failed: " + result.error().message);
732 } else {
733 res.code = 200;
734 res.body = format_query_response(result.value());
735 }
736 };
737
738 // Execute query based on level
739 if (level == "PATIENT") {
740 services::patient_query_keys keys;
741 keys.patient_name = get_str("patient_name");
742 keys.patient_id = get_str("patient_id");
743 keys.birth_date = get_str("birth_date");
744 keys.sex = get_str("sex");
745 auto result = scu.find_patients(assoc, keys);
746 handle_result(result);
747 } else if (level == "STUDY") {
748 services::study_query_keys keys;
749 keys.patient_id = get_str("patient_id");
750 keys.study_uid = get_str("study_uid");
751 keys.study_date = get_str("study_date");
752 keys.accession_number = get_str("accession_number");
753 keys.modality = get_str("modality");
754 keys.study_description = get_str("study_description");
755 auto result = scu.find_studies(assoc, keys);
756 handle_result(result);
757 } else if (level == "SERIES") {
758 services::series_query_keys keys;
759 keys.study_uid = get_str("study_uid");
760 keys.series_uid = get_str("series_uid");
761 keys.modality = get_str("modality");
762 keys.series_number = get_str("series_number");
763 if (keys.study_uid.empty()) {
764 (void)assoc.release();
765 res.code = 400;
766 res.body = make_error_json("INVALID_REQUEST",
767 "study_uid is required for SERIES level queries");
768 return res;
769 }
770 auto result = scu.find_series(assoc, keys);
771 handle_result(result);
772 } else if (level == "IMAGE") {
773 services::instance_query_keys keys;
774 keys.series_uid = get_str("series_uid");
775 keys.sop_instance_uid = get_str("sop_instance_uid");
776 keys.instance_number = get_str("instance_number");
777 if (keys.series_uid.empty()) {
778 (void)assoc.release();
779 res.code = 400;
780 res.body = make_error_json("INVALID_REQUEST",
781 "series_uid is required for IMAGE level queries");
782 return res;
783 }
784 auto result = scu.find_instances(assoc, keys);
785 handle_result(result);
786 } else {
787 (void)assoc.release();
788 res.code = 400;
789 res.body = make_error_json("INVALID_REQUEST",
790 "Invalid query level. Use PATIENT, STUDY, SERIES, "
791 "or IMAGE.");
792 return res;
793 }
794
795 return res;
796 });
797
798 // POST /api/v1/remote-nodes/<nodeId>/retrieve - Retrieve from remote PACS
799 CROW_ROUTE(app, "/api/v1/remote-nodes/<string>/retrieve")
800 .methods(crow::HTTPMethod::POST)(
801 [ctx](const crow::request& req, const std::string& node_id) {
802 crow::response res;
803 res.add_header("Content-Type", "application/json");
804 add_cors_headers(res, *ctx);
805
806 if (!ctx->node_manager) {
807 res.code = 503;
808 res.body = make_error_json("SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE",
809 "Remote node manager not configured");
810 return res;
811 }
812
813 if (!ctx->job_manager) {
814 res.code = 503;
815 res.body = make_error_json("SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE",
816 "Job manager not configured");
817 return res;
818 }
819
820 auto node = ctx->node_manager->get_node(node_id);
821 if (!node) {
822 res.code = 404;
823 res.body = make_error_json("NOT_FOUND", "Remote node not found");
824 return res;
825 }
826
827 if (!node->supports_move && !node->supports_get) {
828 res.code = 400;
829 res.body = make_error_json("UNSUPPORTED",
830 "Remote node does not support C-MOVE or C-GET");
831 return res;
832 }
833
834 // Parse retrieve parameters from request body
835 auto get_str = [&req](const std::string& key) -> std::string {
836 std::string search = "\"" + key + "\":\"";
837 auto pos = req.body.find(search);
838 if (pos == std::string::npos) return "";
839 pos += search.length();
840 auto end_pos = req.body.find('"', pos);
841 if (end_pos == std::string::npos) return "";
842 return req.body.substr(pos, end_pos - pos);
843 };
844
845 auto study_uid = get_str("study_uid");
846 if (study_uid.empty()) {
847 res.code = 400;
848 res.body = make_error_json("INVALID_REQUEST",
849 "study_uid is required");
850 return res;
851 }
852
853 auto series_uid = get_str("series_uid");
854 auto priority_str = get_str("priority");
855
856 // Map priority string to enum
857 auto priority = client::job_priority::normal;
858 if (priority_str == "low") {
859 priority = client::job_priority::low;
860 } else if (priority_str == "high") {
861 priority = client::job_priority::high;
862 } else if (priority_str == "urgent") {
863 priority = client::job_priority::urgent;
864 }
865
866 // Create retrieve job
867 std::optional<std::string_view> series_opt;
868 if (!series_uid.empty()) {
869 series_opt = series_uid;
870 }
871
872 auto job_id = ctx->job_manager->create_retrieve_job(
873 node_id, study_uid, series_opt, priority);
874
875 // Start the job
876 auto start_result = ctx->job_manager->start_job(job_id);
877 if (start_result.is_err()) {
878 res.code = 500;
879 res.body = make_error_json("JOB_START_FAILED",
880 "Failed to start retrieve job: " +
881 start_result.error().message);
882 return res;
883 }
884
885 std::ostringstream oss;
886 oss << R"({"job_id":")" << json_escape(job_id)
887 << R"(","status":"pending"})";
888
889 res.code = 202;
890 res.body = oss.str();
891 return res;
892 });
893}
error_message

638 {
639 // GET /api/v1/routing/rules - List routing rules (paginated)
640 CROW_ROUTE(app, "/api/v1/routing/rules")
641 .methods(crow::HTTPMethod::GET)([ctx](const crow::request& req) {
642 crow::response res;
643 res.add_header("Content-Type", "application/json");
644 add_cors_headers(res, *ctx);
645
646 if (!ctx->routing_manager) {
647 res.code = 503;
648 res.body = make_error_json("SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE",
649 "Routing manager not configured");
650 return res;
651 }
652
653 // Parse pagination
654 auto [limit, offset] = parse_pagination(req);
655
656 // Filter by enabled if provided
657 auto enabled_param = req.url_params.get("enabled");
658 std::vector<client::routing_rule> rules;
659
660 if (enabled_param) {
661 std::string enabled_str(enabled_param);
662 if (enabled_str == "true") {
663 rules = ctx->routing_manager->list_enabled_rules();
664 } else {
665 rules = ctx->routing_manager->list_rules();
666 }
667 } else {
668 rules = ctx->routing_manager->list_rules();
669 }
670
671 size_t total_count = rules.size();
672
673 // Apply pagination
674 std::vector<client::routing_rule> paginated;
675 for (size_t i = offset; i < rules.size() && paginated.size() < limit; ++i) {
676 paginated.push_back(rules[i]);
677 }
678
679 res.code = 200;
680 res.body = rules_to_json(paginated, total_count);
681 return res;
682 });
683
684 // POST /api/v1/routing/rules - Create a new routing rule
685 CROW_ROUTE(app, "/api/v1/routing/rules")
686 .methods(crow::HTTPMethod::POST)([ctx](const crow::request& req) {
687 crow::response res;
688 res.add_header("Content-Type", "application/json");
689 add_cors_headers(res, *ctx);
690
691 if (!ctx->routing_manager) {
692 res.code = 503;
693 res.body = make_error_json("SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE",
694 "Routing manager not configured");
695 return res;
696 }
697
698 std::string error_message;
699 auto rule_opt = parse_rule_from_json(req.body, error_message);
700 if (!rule_opt) {
701 res.code = 400;
702 res.body = make_error_json("INVALID_REQUEST", error_message);
703 return res;
704 }
705
706 auto& rule = *rule_opt;
707
708 // Generate rule_id if not provided
709 if (rule.rule_id.empty()) {
710 auto now = std::chrono::system_clock::now();
711 auto ms = std::chrono::duration_cast<std::chrono::milliseconds>(
712 now.time_since_epoch()).count();
713 rule.rule_id = "rule_" + std::to_string(ms);
714 }
715
716 auto result = ctx->routing_manager->add_rule(rule);
717 if (!result.is_ok()) {
718 res.code = 409;
719 res.body = make_error_json("CONFLICT", result.error().message);
720 return res;
721 }
722
723 // Retrieve the created rule to get full details
724 auto created_rule = ctx->routing_manager->get_rule(rule.rule_id);
725 if (!created_rule) {
726 res.code = 201;
727 res.body = rule_to_json(rule);
728 return res;
729 }
730
731 res.code = 201;
732 res.body = rule_to_json(*created_rule);
733 return res;
734 });
735
736 // GET /api/v1/routing/rules/<ruleId> - Get a specific routing rule
737 CROW_ROUTE(app, "/api/v1/routing/rules/<string>")
738 .methods(crow::HTTPMethod::GET)(
739 [ctx](const crow::request& /*req*/, const std::string& rule_id) {
740 crow::response res;
741 res.add_header("Content-Type", "application/json");
742 add_cors_headers(res, *ctx);
743
744 if (!ctx->routing_manager) {
745 res.code = 503;
746 res.body = make_error_json("SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE",
747 "Routing manager not configured");
748 return res;
749 }
750
751 auto rule = ctx->routing_manager->get_rule(rule_id);
752 if (!rule) {
753 res.code = 404;
754 res.body = make_error_json("NOT_FOUND", "Routing rule not found");
755 return res;
756 }
757
758 res.code = 200;
759 res.body = rule_to_json(*rule);
760 return res;
761 });
762
763 // PUT /api/v1/routing/rules/<ruleId> - Update a routing rule
764 CROW_ROUTE(app, "/api/v1/routing/rules/<string>")
765 .methods(crow::HTTPMethod::PUT)(
766 [ctx](const crow::request& req, const std::string& rule_id) {
767 crow::response res;
768 res.add_header("Content-Type", "application/json");
769 add_cors_headers(res, *ctx);
770
771 if (!ctx->routing_manager) {
772 res.code = 503;
773 res.body = make_error_json("SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE",
774 "Routing manager not configured");
775 return res;
776 }
777
778 // Check if rule exists
779 auto existing = ctx->routing_manager->get_rule(rule_id);
780 if (!existing) {
781 res.code = 404;
782 res.body = make_error_json("NOT_FOUND", "Routing rule not found");
783 return res;
784 }
785
786 std::string error_message;
787 auto rule_opt = parse_rule_from_json(req.body, error_message);
788 if (!rule_opt) {
789 res.code = 400;
790 res.body = make_error_json("INVALID_REQUEST", error_message);
791 return res;
792 }
793
794 auto& rule = *rule_opt;
795 rule.rule_id = rule_id; // Preserve the rule_id from URL
796
797 auto result = ctx->routing_manager->update_rule(rule);
798 if (!result.is_ok()) {
799 res.code = 500;
800 res.body = make_error_json("UPDATE_FAILED", result.error().message);
801 return res;
802 }
803
804 // Retrieve the updated rule
805 auto updated_rule = ctx->routing_manager->get_rule(rule_id);
806 if (!updated_rule) {
807 res.code = 200;
808 res.body = rule_to_json(rule);
809 return res;
810 }
811
812 res.code = 200;
813 res.body = rule_to_json(*updated_rule);
814 return res;
815 });
816
817 // DELETE /api/v1/routing/rules/<ruleId> - Delete a routing rule
818 CROW_ROUTE(app, "/api/v1/routing/rules/<string>")
819 .methods(crow::HTTPMethod::DELETE)(
820 [ctx](const crow::request& /*req*/, const std::string& rule_id) {
821 crow::response res;
822 add_cors_headers(res, *ctx);
823
824 if (!ctx->routing_manager) {
825 res.add_header("Content-Type", "application/json");
826 res.code = 503;
827 res.body = make_error_json("SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE",
828 "Routing manager not configured");
829 return res;
830 }
831
832 // Check if rule exists
833 auto existing = ctx->routing_manager->get_rule(rule_id);
834 if (!existing) {
835 res.add_header("Content-Type", "application/json");
836 res.code = 404;
837 res.body = make_error_json("NOT_FOUND", "Routing rule not found");
838 return res;
839 }
840
841 auto result = ctx->routing_manager->remove_rule(rule_id);
842 if (!result.is_ok()) {
843 res.add_header("Content-Type", "application/json");
844 res.code = 500;
845 res.body = make_error_json("DELETE_FAILED", result.error().message);
846 return res;
847 }
848
849 res.code = 204;
850 return res;
851 });
852
853 // POST /api/v1/routing/rules/reorder - Reorder routing rules
854 CROW_ROUTE(app, "/api/v1/routing/rules/reorder")
855 .methods(crow::HTTPMethod::POST)([ctx](const crow::request& req) {
856 crow::response res;
857 res.add_header("Content-Type", "application/json");
858 add_cors_headers(res, *ctx);
859
860 if (!ctx->routing_manager) {
861 res.code = 503;
862 res.body = make_error_json("SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE",
863 "Routing manager not configured");
864 return res;
865 }
866
867 auto rule_ids = parse_rule_ids(req.body);
868 if (rule_ids.empty()) {
869 res.code = 400;
870 res.body = make_error_json("INVALID_REQUEST",
871 "rule_ids array is required");
872 return res;
873 }
874
875 auto result = ctx->routing_manager->reorder_rules(rule_ids);
876 if (!result.is_ok()) {
877 res.code = 400;
878 res.body = make_error_json("REORDER_FAILED", result.error().message);
879 return res;
880 }
881
882 res.code = 200;
883 res.body = R"({"status":"success"})";
884 return res;
885 });
886
887 // POST /api/v1/routing/enable - Enable routing globally
888 CROW_ROUTE(app, "/api/v1/routing/enable")
889 .methods(crow::HTTPMethod::POST)([ctx](const crow::request& /*req*/) {
890 crow::response res;
891 res.add_header("Content-Type", "application/json");
892 add_cors_headers(res, *ctx);
893
894 if (!ctx->routing_manager) {
895 res.code = 503;
896 res.body = make_error_json("SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE",
897 "Routing manager not configured");
898 return res;
899 }
900
901 ctx->routing_manager->enable();
902
903 res.code = 200;

907
908 // POST /api/v1/routing/disable - Disable routing globally
909 CROW_ROUTE(app, "/api/v1/routing/disable")
910 .methods(crow::HTTPMethod::POST)([ctx](const crow::request& /*req*/) {
911 crow::response res;
912 res.add_header("Content-Type", "application/json");
913 add_cors_headers(res, *ctx);
914
915 if (!ctx->routing_manager) {
916 res.code = 503;

918 "Routing manager not configured");

921
922 ctx->routing_manager->disable();

928
929 // GET /api/v1/routing/status - Get routing status and statistics
930 CROW_ROUTE(app, "/api/v1/routing/status")
931 .methods(crow::HTTPMethod::GET)([ctx](const crow::request& /*req*/) {
932 crow::response res;
933 res.add_header("Content-Type", "application/json");
934 add_cors_headers(res, *ctx);
935
936 if (!ctx->routing_manager) {
937 res.code = 503;
938 res.body = make_error_json("SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE",
939 "Routing manager not configured");
940 return res;
941 }
942
943 bool enabled = ctx->routing_manager->is_enabled();
944 auto all_rules = ctx->routing_manager->list_rules();
945 auto enabled_rules = ctx->routing_manager->list_enabled_rules();
946 auto stats = ctx->routing_manager->get_statistics();
947
948 std::ostringstream oss;
949 oss << R"({"enabled":)" << (enabled ? "true" : "false")
950 << R"(,"rules_count":)" << all_rules.size()
951 << R"(,"enabled_rules_count":)" << enabled_rules.size()
952 << R"(,"statistics":{)"
953 << R"("total_evaluated":)" << stats.total_evaluated
954 << R"(,"total_matched":)" << stats.total_matched
955 << R"(,"total_forwarded":)" << stats.total_forwarded
956 << R"(,"total_failed":)" << stats.total_failed
957 << R"(}})";
958
959 res.code = 200;
960 res.body = oss.str();
961 return res;
962 });
963
964 // POST /api/v1/routing/test - Test all rules against a dataset (dry run)
965 CROW_ROUTE(app, "/api/v1/routing/test")
966 .methods(crow::HTTPMethod::POST)([ctx](const crow::request& req) {
967 crow::response res;
968 res.add_header("Content-Type", "application/json");
969 add_cors_headers(res, *ctx);
970
971 if (!ctx->routing_manager) {
972 res.code = 503;
973 res.body = make_error_json("SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE",
974 "Routing manager not configured");
975 return res;
976 }
977
978 // Parse dataset from request body
979 auto dataset = parse_test_dataset(req.body);
980 if (dataset.empty()) {
981 res.code = 400;
982 res.body = make_error_json("INVALID_REQUEST",
983 "dataset object is required");
984 return res;
985 }
986
987 // Evaluate rules against the dataset
988 // Note: evaluate_with_rule_ids requires routing to be enabled,
989 // so we use a direct evaluation approach for testing
990 auto matches = ctx->routing_manager->evaluate_with_rule_ids(dataset);
991
992 bool matched = !matches.empty();
993 res.code = 200;
994 res.body = test_result_to_json(matched, matches, ctx->routing_manager);
995 return res;
996 });
997
998 // POST /api/v1/routing/rules/<ruleId>/test - Test specific rule against a dataset
999 CROW_ROUTE(app, "/api/v1/routing/rules/<string>/test")
1000 .methods(crow::HTTPMethod::POST)(
1001 [ctx](const crow::request& req, const std::string& rule_id) {
1002 crow::response res;
1003 res.add_header("Content-Type", "application/json");
1004 add_cors_headers(res, *ctx);
1005
1006 if (!ctx->routing_manager) {
1007 res.code = 503;
1008 res.body = make_error_json("SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE",
1009 "Routing manager not configured");
1010 return res;
1011 }
1012
1013 // Check if rule exists
1014 auto rule = ctx->routing_manager->get_rule(rule_id);
1015 if (!rule) {
1016 res.code = 404;
1017 res.body = make_error_json("NOT_FOUND", "Routing rule not found");
1018 return res;
1019 }
1020
1021 // Parse dataset from request body
1022 auto dataset = parse_test_dataset(req.body);
1023 if (dataset.empty()) {
1024 res.code = 400;
1025 res.body = make_error_json("INVALID_REQUEST",
1026 "dataset object is required");
1027 return res;
1028 }
1029
1030 // Test only this specific rule
1031 // We need to manually check if all conditions match
1032 bool all_match = !rule->conditions.empty();
1033 for (const auto& condition : rule->conditions) {
1034 // Get the field value from dataset
1035 std::string value;
1036 switch (condition.match_field) {
1037 case client::routing_field::modality:
1038 value = dataset.get_string(core::tags::modality);
1039 break;
1040 case client::routing_field::station_ae:
1041 value = dataset.get_string(core::tags::station_name);
1042 break;
1043 case client::routing_field::institution:
1044 value = dataset.get_string(core::tags::institution_name);
1045 break;
1046 case client::routing_field::department:
1047 value = dataset.get_string(core::dicom_tag{0x0008, 0x1040});
1048 break;
1049 case client::routing_field::referring_physician:
1050 value = dataset.get_string(core::tags::referring_physician_name);
1051 break;
1052 case client::routing_field::study_description:
1053 value = dataset.get_string(core::tags::study_description);
1054 break;
1055 case client::routing_field::series_description:
1056 value = dataset.get_string(core::tags::series_description);
1057 break;
1058 case client::routing_field::body_part:
1059 value = dataset.get_string(core::dicom_tag{0x0018, 0x0015});
1060 break;
1061 case client::routing_field::patient_id_pattern:
1062 value = dataset.get_string(core::tags::patient_id);
1063 break;
1064 case client::routing_field::sop_class_uid:
1065 value = dataset.get_string(core::tags::sop_class_uid);
1066 break;
1067 default:
1068 break;
1069 }
1070
1071 // Simple wildcard matching
1072 auto match_wildcard = [](std::string_view pattern,
1073 std::string_view val,
1074 bool case_sensitive) -> bool {
1075 auto to_lower = [](std::string_view s) {
1076 std::string result;
1077 result.reserve(s.size());
1078 for (char c : s) {
1079 result += static_cast<char>(std::tolower(
1080 static_cast<unsigned char>(c)));
1081 }
1082 return result;
1083 };
1084
1085 std::string pat_str = case_sensitive ?
1086 std::string(pattern) : to_lower(pattern);
1087 std::string val_str = case_sensitive ?
1088 std::string(val) : to_lower(val);
1089
1090 const char* p = pat_str.c_str();
1091 const char* v = val_str.c_str();
1092 const char* star_p = nullptr;
1093 const char* star_v = nullptr;
1094
1095 while (*v) {
1096 if (*p == '*') {
1097 star_p = p++;
1098 star_v = v;
1099 } else if (*p == '?' || *p == *v) {
1100 ++p;
1101 ++v;
1102 } else if (star_p) {
1103 p = star_p + 1;
1104 v = ++star_v;
1105 } else {
1106 return false;
1107 }
1108 }
1109
1110 while (*p == '*') {
1111 ++p;
1112 }
1113
1114 return *p == '\0';
1115 };
1116
1117 bool matched = match_wildcard(condition.pattern, value,
1118 condition.case_sensitive);
1119 if (condition.negate) {
1120 matched = !matched;
1121 }
1122
1123 if (!matched) {
1124 all_match = false;
1125 break;
1126 }
1127 }
1128
1129 res.code = 200;
1130 if (all_match) {
1131 res.body = single_rule_test_to_json(true, rule->actions);
1132 } else {
1133 res.body = single_rule_test_to_json(false, {});
1134 }
1135 return res;
1136 });
1137}

98 crow::response res;

100
101 if (!ctx->security_manager) {

122

124 if (result.is_err()) {
125 // Could distinguish user not found vs other errors

127 res.code = 500;
128 } else {
129 res.body = make_success_json("Role assigned");
130 res.code = 200;

Definition at line 431 of file storage_commitment_endpoints.cpp.

433 {
434
435 // Shared transaction store for all requests
436 auto store = std::make_shared<storage_commitment::transaction_store>();
437
438 // POST /dicomweb/storage-commitments
439 // Request storage commitment for a list of SOP Instances
440 CROW_ROUTE(app, "/dicomweb/storage-commitments")
441 .methods(crow::HTTPMethod::POST)(
442 [ctx, store](const crow::request& req) {
443 crow::response res;
444 res.add_header("Content-Type", "application/dicom+json");
445 add_cors_headers(res, *ctx);
446
447 if (!check_storage_commitment_auth(
448 ctx, req, res, {"dicomweb.write"})) {
449 return res;
450 }
451
452 if (!ctx->database) {
453 res.code = 503;
454 res.body = make_error_json(
455 "DATABASE_UNAVAILABLE",
456 "Storage service is not available");
457 return res;
458 }
459
460 auto parsed = storage_commitment::parse_commitment_request(
461 req.body);
462
463 if (!parsed.valid) {
464 res.code = 400;
465 res.body = make_error_json(
466 "INVALID_REQUEST", parsed.error_message);
467 return res;
468 }
469
470 // Create transaction
471 storage_commitment::commitment_transaction txn;
472 txn.transaction_uid = generate_transaction_uid();
473 txn.state = storage_commitment::transaction_state::pending;
474 txn.requested_references = std::move(parsed.references);
475 txn.created_at = std::chrono::system_clock::now();
476
477 store->add(txn);
478
479 // Verify instances synchronously for simplicity
480 // (async with thread pool in production)
481 verify_instances_async(ctx, store, txn.transaction_uid);
482
483 auto result = store->find(txn.transaction_uid);
484 res.code = 202; // Accepted
485 res.add_header("Content-Location",
486 "/dicomweb/storage-commitments/" +
487 txn.transaction_uid);
488 res.body = storage_commitment::transaction_to_json(*result);
489 return res;
490 });
491
492 // POST /dicomweb/studies/{studyUID}/commitment
493 // Request storage commitment for a study
494 CROW_ROUTE(app, "/dicomweb/studies/<string>/commitment")
495 .methods(crow::HTTPMethod::POST)(
496 [ctx, store](const crow::request& req,
497 const std::string& study_uid) {
498 crow::response res;
499 res.add_header("Content-Type", "application/dicom+json");
500 add_cors_headers(res, *ctx);
501
502 if (!check_storage_commitment_auth(
503 ctx, req, res, {"dicomweb.write"})) {
504 return res;
505 }
506
507 if (!ctx->database) {
508 res.code = 503;
509 res.body = make_error_json(
510 "DATABASE_UNAVAILABLE",
511 "Storage service is not available");
512 return res;
513 }
514
515 auto parsed = storage_commitment::parse_commitment_request(
516 req.body, study_uid);
517
518 if (!parsed.valid) {
519 res.code = 400;
520 res.body = make_error_json(
521 "INVALID_REQUEST", parsed.error_message);
522 return res;
523 }
524
525 storage_commitment::commitment_transaction txn;
526 txn.transaction_uid = generate_transaction_uid();
527 txn.state = storage_commitment::transaction_state::pending;
528 txn.requested_references = std::move(parsed.references);
529 txn.study_instance_uid = study_uid;
530 txn.created_at = std::chrono::system_clock::now();
531
532 store->add(txn);
533 verify_instances_async(ctx, store, txn.transaction_uid);
534
535 auto result = store->find(txn.transaction_uid);
536 res.code = 202;
537 res.add_header("Content-Location",
538 "/dicomweb/storage-commitments/" +
539 txn.transaction_uid);
540 res.body = storage_commitment::transaction_to_json(*result);
541 return res;
542 });
543
544 // GET /dicomweb/storage-commitments/{transactionUID}
545 // Check commitment status
546 CROW_ROUTE(app, "/dicomweb/storage-commitments/<string>")
547 .methods(crow::HTTPMethod::GET)(
548 [ctx, store](const crow::request& req,
549 const std::string& transaction_uid) {
550 crow::response res;
551 res.add_header("Content-Type", "application/dicom+json");
552 add_cors_headers(res, *ctx);
553
554 if (!check_storage_commitment_auth(
555 ctx, req, res, {"dicomweb.read"})) {
556 return res;
557 }
558
559 auto txn = store->find(transaction_uid);
560 if (!txn) {
561 res.code = 404;
562 res.body = make_error_json(
563 "NOT_FOUND",
564 "Transaction not found: " + transaction_uid);
565 return res;
566 }
567
568 res.code = 200;
569 res.body = storage_commitment::transaction_to_json(*txn);
570 return res;
571 });
572
573 // GET /dicomweb/storage-commitments
574 // List all commitment transactions
575 CROW_ROUTE(app, "/dicomweb/storage-commitments")
576 .methods(crow::HTTPMethod::GET)(
577 [ctx, store](const crow::request& req) {
578 crow::response res;
579 res.add_header("Content-Type", "application/dicom+json");
580 add_cors_headers(res, *ctx);
581
582 if (!check_storage_commitment_auth(
583 ctx, req, res, {"dicomweb.read"})) {
584 return res;
585 }
586
587 size_t limit = 100;
588 auto limit_param = req.url_params.get("limit");
589 if (limit_param != nullptr) {
590 try {
591 int val = std::stoi(limit_param);
592 if (val > 0) {
593 limit = static_cast<size_t>(val);
594 }
595 } catch (...) {
596 // Use default
597 }
598 }
599
600 auto transactions = store->list(limit);
601 res.code = 200;
602 res.body = storage_commitment::transactions_to_json(transactions);
603 return res;
604 });
605}

222 crow::response res;

233 // Parse pagination

237 storage::study_query query;
238 query.limit = limit;

240
241 auto patient_id = req.url_params.get("patient_id");
242 if (patient_id) {
243 query.patient_id = patient_id;
244 }
245

253 query.study_uid = study_uid;
254 }
255

258 query.study_id = study_id;
259 }
260

263 query.study_date = study_date;
264 }
265
266 auto study_date_from = req.url_params.get("study_date_from");
267 if (study_date_from) {
268 query.study_date_from = study_date_from;
269 }
270

273 query.study_date_to = study_date_to;
274 }
275

277 if (accession_number) {
278 query.accession_number = accession_number;
279 }
280
281 auto modality = req.url_params.get("modality");
282 if (modality) {
283 query.modality = modality;
284 }
285
286 auto referring_physician = req.url_params.get("referring_physician");
287 if (referring_physician) {
288 query.referring_physician = referring_physician;
289 }
290
291 auto study_description = req.url_params.get("study_description");
292 if (study_description) {
293 query.study_description = study_description;
294 }
295
296 // Get total count (without pagination)
297 storage::study_query count_query = query;
298 count_query.limit = 0;
299 count_query.offset = 0;
300 auto all_studies_result = ctx->database->search_studies(count_query);
301 if (!all_studies_result.is_ok()) {
302 res.code = 500;
303 res.body = make_error_json("QUERY_ERROR",
304 all_studies_result.error().message);
305 return res;
306 }
307 size_t total_count = all_studies_result.value().size();
308
309 // Get paginated results
310 auto studies_result = ctx->database->search_studies(query);
311 if (!studies_result.is_ok()) {
312 res.code = 500;
313 res.body = make_error_json("QUERY_ERROR",
314 studies_result.error().message);
315 return res;
316 }
317
318 res.code = 200;
319 res.body = studies_to_json(studies_result.value(), total_count);
320 return res;
321 });

354 crow::response res;
355 res.add_header("Content-Type", "application/json");
356 add_cors_headers(res, *ctx);
357
358 if (!ctx->database) {
359 res.code = 503;
360 res.body = make_error_json("DATABASE_UNAVAILABLE",
361 "Database not configured");
362 return res;
363 }
364
365 // Verify study exists
366 auto study = ctx->database->find_study(study_uid);
367 if (!study) {
368 res.code = 404;
369 res.body = make_error_json("NOT_FOUND", "Study not found");
370 return res;
371 }
372
373 auto series_list_result = ctx->database->list_series(study_uid);
374 if (!series_list_result.is_ok()) {
375 res.code = 500;

383 return res;

385
386 // GET /api/v1/studies/:uid/instances - Get study's instances (all series)
387 CROW_ROUTE(app, "/api/v1/studies/<string>/instances")
388 .methods(crow::HTTPMethod::GET)(
389 [ctx](const crow::request & /*req*/, const std::string &study_uid) {
390 crow::response res;
391 res.add_header("Content-Type", "application/json");
392 add_cors_headers(res, *ctx);
393
394 if (!ctx->database) {
395 res.code = 503;
396 res.body = make_error_json("DATABASE_UNAVAILABLE",
397 "Database not configured");
398 return res;
399 }
400
401 // Verify study exists
402 auto study = ctx->database->find_study(study_uid);
403 if (!study) {
404 res.code = 404;
405 res.body = make_error_json("NOT_FOUND", "Study not found");
406 return res;
407 }
408
409 // Get all series and their instances
410 std::vector<storage::instance_record> all_instances;
411 auto series_list_result = ctx->database->list_series(study_uid);
412 if (!series_list_result.is_ok()) {
413 res.code = 500;
414 res.body = make_error_json("QUERY_ERROR",
415 series_list_result.error().message);
416 return res;
417 }
418 for (const auto &series : series_list_result.value()) {
419 auto instances_result = ctx->database->list_instances(series.series_uid);
420 if (!instances_result.is_ok()) {
421 res.code = 500;
422 res.body = make_error_json("QUERY_ERROR",
423 instances_result.error().message);
424 return res;
425 }
426 const auto& instances = instances_result.value();
427 all_instances.insert(all_instances.end(), instances.begin(),
428 instances.end());
429 }
430
431 res.code = 200;
432 res.body = instances_to_json(all_instances);
433 return res;
434 });
435
436 // DELETE /api/v1/studies/:uid - Delete study
437 CROW_ROUTE(app, "/api/v1/studies/<string>")
438 .methods(crow::HTTPMethod::DELETE)(
439 [ctx](const crow::request & /*req*/, const std::string &study_uid) {
440 crow::response res;
441 res.add_header("Content-Type", "application/json");
442 add_cors_headers(res, *ctx);
443
444 if (!ctx->database) {
445 res.code = 503;
446 res.body = make_error_json("DATABASE_UNAVAILABLE",
447 "Database not configured");
448 return res;
449 }
450
451 // Verify study exists
452 auto study = ctx->database->find_study(study_uid);
453 if (!study) {
454 res.code = 404;
455 res.body = make_error_json("NOT_FOUND", "Study not found");
456 return res;
457 }
458
459 auto result = ctx->database->delete_study(study_uid);
460 if (result.is_err()) {
461 res.code = 500;
462 res.body = make_error_json("DELETE_FAILED",
463 result.error().message);
464 return res;
465 }
466
467 res.code = 200;
468 res.body = make_success_json("Study deleted successfully");
469 return res;
470 });
471}

135 .methods(crow::HTTPMethod::GET)([ctx](const crow::request &req) {
136 crow::response res;
137 res.add_header("Content-Type", "application/json");
138 add_cors_headers(res, *ctx);
139
140 // Permission Check: System Read
141 if (!check_permission(ctx, req, res, security::ResourceType::System,
142 security::Action::Read)) {
143 return res;
144 }
145
146 crow::json::wvalue status_json;
147 status_json["status"] = "unknown"; // Default
148 status_json["message"] = "Health checker not configured"; // Default
149 status_json["version"] = "1.0.0"; // Default
150
151#ifdef PACS_WITH_MONITORING
152 if (ctx->health_checker) {
153 auto status = ctx->health_checker->get_status();
154 // to_json is a free function in kcenon::pacs::monitoring namespace

156 monitoring::to_json(status)); // Parse existing JSON into wvalue
157 status_json["version"] = "1.0.0"; // Add version
158 } else {
159 status_json["status"] = "unknown";
160 status_json["message"] = "Health checker not configured";
161 }
162#else
163 // Basic status without monitoring module
164 res.code = 200;
165#endif
166 return res;
167 });

171 crow::response res;
172 res.add_header("Content-Type", "application/json");
173 add_cors_headers(res, *ctx);
174
175#ifdef PACS_WITH_MONITORING
176 if (ctx->metrics) {
177 // pacs_metrics provides individual counters, build simple JSON
178 std::ostringstream oss;
179 oss << R"({"message":"Metrics available via pacs_metrics API"})";
180 res.body = oss.str();
181 res.code = 200;
182 } else {
183 res.body =
184 R"({"error":{"code":"METRICS_UNAVAILABLE","message":"Metrics provider not configured"}})";
185 res.code = 503;
186 }
187#else
188 // Basic metrics without monitoring module
189 res.body =
190 R"({"uptime_seconds":0,"requests_total":0,"message":"Metrics module not available"})";
191 res.code = 200;
192#endif
193 return res;
194 });

198 .methods(crow::HTTPMethod::GET)([ctx]() {

202

214 // PUT /api/v1/system/config - Update configuration
215 CROW_ROUTE(app, "/api/v1/system/config")
216 .methods(crow::HTTPMethod::PUT)([ctx](const crow::request &req) {
217 crow::response res;
218 res.add_header("Content-Type", "application/json");
219 add_cors_headers(res, *ctx);
220
221 // Validate content type
222 auto content_type = req.get_header_value("Content-Type");
223 if (content_type.find("application/json") == std::string::npos) {
224 res.body = make_error_json("INVALID_CONTENT_TYPE",
225 "Content-Type must be application/json");
226 res.code = 415;
227 return res;
228 }
229
230 // Validate body is not empty
231 if (req.body.empty()) {
232 res.body = make_error_json("EMPTY_BODY", "Request body is required");
233 res.code = 400;
234 return res;
235 }
236
237 // Note: Full configuration update would require parsing JSON and
238 // updating the config. For now, we return a placeholder success
239 // response. Actual implementation would need a callback or direct
240 // config reference.
241 res.body = make_success_json("Configuration update acknowledged");
242 res.code = 200;
243 return res;
244 });
245
246 // GET /api/v1/system/version - API version info

251
252 res.body =
253 R"({"api_version":"v1","pacs_version":"1.2.0","crow_version":"1.2.0"})";
254 res.code = 200;
255 return res;
256 });

274 // GET /api/v1/thumbnails/cache/stats - Get cache statistics
275 CROW_ROUTE(app, "/api/v1/thumbnails/cache/stats")
276 .methods(crow::HTTPMethod::GET)([ctx](const crow::request& /*req*/) {
277 crow::response res;
278 res.add_header("Content-Type", "application/json");
279 add_cors_headers(res, *ctx);
280
281 if (g_thumbnail_service == nullptr) {
282 res.code = 503;
283 res.body = make_error_json("SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE",
284 "Thumbnail service not configured");
285 return res;
286 }
287
288 std::ostringstream oss;
289 oss << R"({"cache_size":)" << g_thumbnail_service->cache_size()
290 << R"(,"entry_count":)" << g_thumbnail_service->cache_entry_count()
291 << R"(,"max_size":)" << g_thumbnail_service->max_cache_size()
292 << "}";
293
294 res.code = 200;
295 res.body = oss.str();
296 return res;
297 });
298}

278 if (!ctx->database) {

313#ifdef PACS_WITH_DATABASE_SYSTEM
314 repo.save(state);
315#else
316 repo.save_state(state);

319 res.code = 500;

321 make_error_json("SAVE_ERROR", save_result.error().message);
322 return res;
323 }
324
325 // Also record study access if user_id is provided
326 if (!state.user_id.empty()) {
327 #ifdef PACS_WITH_DATABASE_SYSTEM
328 (void)recent_repo.record_access(state.user_id, state.study_uid);
329 #else
330 (void)repo.record_study_access(state.user_id, state.study_uid);
331 #endif
332 }
333
334 res.code = 201;
335 std::ostringstream oss;

337 << R"(","created_at":")" << format_timestamp(state.created_at)
338 << R"("})";
339 res.body = oss.str();
340 return res;

327 {
328
329 // GET /wado?requestType=WADO&studyUID=...&seriesUID=...&objectUID=...
330 CROW_ROUTE(app, "/wado")
331 .methods(crow::HTTPMethod::GET)(
332 [ctx](const crow::request& req) {
333 crow::response res;
334 add_cors_headers(res, *ctx);
335
336 // OAuth 2.0 / legacy auth check (read scope for WADO-URI)
337 if (ctx->oauth2 && ctx->oauth2->enabled()) {
338 auto auth = ctx->oauth2->authenticate(req, res);
339 if (!auth) return res;
340 if (!ctx->oauth2->require_any_scope(
341 auth->claims, res,
342 {"dicomweb.read"})) {
343 return res;
344 }
345 }
346
347 // Validate requestType parameter
348 auto request_type = req.url_params.get("requestType");
349 if (request_type == nullptr
350 || std::string(request_type) != "WADO") {
351 res.code = 400;
352 res.add_header("Content-Type", "application/json");
353 res.body = make_error_json(
354 "INVALID_REQUEST_TYPE",
355 "requestType must be 'WADO'");
356 return res;
357 }
358
359 // Check database availability
360 if (!ctx->database) {
361 res.code = 503;
362 res.add_header("Content-Type", "application/json");
363 res.body = make_error_json(
364 "DATABASE_UNAVAILABLE", "Database not configured");
365 return res;
366 }
367
368 // Parse and validate parameters
369 auto wado_request = wado_uri::parse_wado_uri_params(
370 req.url_params.get("studyUID"),
371 req.url_params.get("seriesUID"),
372 req.url_params.get("objectUID"),
373 req.url_params.get("contentType"),
374 req.url_params.get("transferSyntax"),
375 req.url_params.get("anonymize"),
376 req.url_params.get("rows"),
377 req.url_params.get("columns"),
378 req.url_params.get("windowCenter"),
379 req.url_params.get("windowWidth"),
380 req.url_params.get("frameNumber"));
381
382 auto validation = wado_uri::validate_wado_uri_request(
383 wado_request);
384 if (!validation.valid) {
385 res.code = validation.http_status;
386 res.add_header("Content-Type", "application/json");
387 res.body = make_error_json(
388 validation.error_code, validation.error_message);
389 return res;
390 }
391
392 // Look up the DICOM instance
393 auto file_path_result = ctx->database->get_file_path(
394 wado_request.object_uid);
395 if (!file_path_result.is_ok()) {
396 res.code = 500;
397 res.add_header("Content-Type", "application/json");
398 res.body = make_error_json(
399 "QUERY_ERROR", file_path_result.error().message);
400 return res;
401 }
402 const auto& file_path = file_path_result.value();
403 if (!file_path) {
404 res.code = 404;
405 res.add_header("Content-Type", "application/json");
406 res.body = make_error_json(
407 "NOT_FOUND", "DICOM instance not found");
408 return res;
409 }
410
411 // Route to appropriate handler based on content type
412 if (wado_request.content_type == "application/dicom") {
413 return handle_dicom_response(*file_path, *ctx);
414 }
415 if (wado_request.content_type == "image/jpeg"
416 || wado_request.content_type == "image/png") {
417 return handle_rendered_response(
418 *file_path, wado_request, *ctx);
419 }
420 if (wado_request.content_type == "application/dicom+json") {
421 return handle_dicom_json_response(*file_path, *ctx);
422 }
423
424 // Should not reach here due to validation, but handle defensively
425 res.code = 406;
426 res.add_header("Content-Type", "application/json");
427 res.body = make_error_json(
428 "UNSUPPORTED_MEDIA_TYPE",
429 "Unsupported contentType: " + wado_request.content_type);
430 return res;
431 });
432}

277 }
278

281 query.step_id = step_id;
282 }
283
284 // Check if we should include all statuses
285 auto include_all = req.url_params.get("include_all_status");
286 if (include_all && std::string(include_all) == "true") {
287 query.include_all_status = true;
288 }
289
290 // Get total count (without pagination)
291 storage::worklist_query count_query = query;
292 count_query.limit = 0;
293 count_query.offset = 0;
294 auto all_items_result = ctx->database->query_worklist(count_query);
295 if (!all_items_result.is_ok()) {
296 res.code = 500;
297 res.body = make_error_json("QUERY_ERROR",
298 all_items_result.error().message);
299 return res;
300 }

302
303 // Get paginated results
304 auto items_result = ctx->database->query_worklist(query);
305 if (!items_result.is_ok()) {
306 res.code = 500;
307 res.body = make_error_json("QUERY_ERROR",
308 items_result.error().message);
309 return res;
310 }
311
312 res.code = 200;
313 res.body = worklist_items_to_json(items_result.value(), total_count);
314 return res;
315 });
316
317 // POST /api/v1/worklist - Create worklist item
318 CROW_ROUTE(app, "/api/v1/worklist")
319 .methods(crow::HTTPMethod::POST)([ctx](const crow::request &req) {
320 crow::response res;
321 res.add_header("Content-Type", "application/json");
322 add_cors_headers(res, *ctx);
323
324 if (!ctx->database) {
325 res.code = 503;
326 res.body =
327 make_error_json("DATABASE_UNAVAILABLE", "Database not configured");
328 return res;
329 }
330
331 // Parse request body
332 auto item = parse_worklist_item_json(req.body);
333 if (!item) {
334 res.code = 400;
335 res.body = make_error_json(
336 "INVALID_REQUEST",
337 "Missing required fields: step_id, patient_id, modality, "
338 "scheduled_datetime");
339 return res;
340 }
341
342 // Add worklist item
343 auto result = ctx->database->add_worklist_item(*item);
344 if (result.is_err()) {
345 res.code = 500;
346 res.body = make_error_json("CREATE_FAILED", result.error().message);
347 return res;
348 }
349
350 // Fetch the created item to return
351 auto created_item = ctx->database->find_worklist_by_pk(result.value());
352 if (created_item) {
353 res.code = 201;
354 res.body = worklist_item_to_json(*created_item);
355 } else {
356 res.code = 201;
357 res.body = make_success_json("Worklist item created");
358 }
359 return res;
360 });
361

375 }
376

381 return res;
382 }
383

389 // PUT /api/v1/worklist/:id - Update worklist item
390 CROW_ROUTE(app, "/api/v1/worklist/<int>")
391 .methods(crow::HTTPMethod::PUT)(
392 [ctx](const crow::request &req, int pk) {
393 crow::response res;
394 res.add_header("Content-Type", "application/json");
395 add_cors_headers(res, *ctx);
396
397 if (!ctx->database) {
398 res.code = 503;
399 res.body = make_error_json("DATABASE_UNAVAILABLE",
400 "Database not configured");
401 return res;
402 }
403
404 // Verify item exists
405 auto existing_item = ctx->database->find_worklist_by_pk(pk);
406 if (!existing_item) {
407 res.code = 404;
408 res.body = make_error_json("NOT_FOUND", "Worklist item not found");
409 return res;
410 }
411
412 // Parse new status from request body
413 auto get_json_string = [&req](const std::string &key) -> std::string {
414 std::string search_key = "\"" + key + "\":\"";
415 auto pos = req.body.find(search_key);
416 if (pos == std::string::npos) {
417 return "";
418 }
419 pos += search_key.length();
420 auto end_pos = req.body.find("\"", pos);
421 if (end_pos == std::string::npos) {
422 return "";
423 }
424 return req.body.substr(pos, end_pos - pos);
425 };
426
427 std::string new_status = get_json_string("step_status");
428 if (new_status.empty()) {
429 res.code = 400;
430 res.body = make_error_json("INVALID_REQUEST",
431 "step_status is required for update");
432 return res;
433 }
434
435 // Update status
436 auto result = ctx->database->update_worklist_status(
437 existing_item->step_id,
438 existing_item->accession_no,
439 new_status);
440
441 if (result.is_err()) {
442 res.code = 500;
443 res.body = make_error_json("UPDATE_FAILED", result.error().message);
444 return res;
445 }
446
447 // Fetch updated item
448 auto updated_item = ctx->database->find_worklist_by_pk(pk);
449 if (updated_item) {
450 res.code = 200;
451 res.body = worklist_item_to_json(*updated_item);
452 } else {
453 res.code = 200;
454 res.body = make_success_json("Worklist item updated");
455 }
456 return res;
457 });
458
459 // DELETE /api/v1/worklist/:id - Delete worklist item
460 CROW_ROUTE(app, "/api/v1/worklist/<int>")
461 .methods(crow::HTTPMethod::DELETE)(
462 [ctx](const crow::request & /*req*/, int pk) {
463 crow::response res;
464 res.add_header("Content-Type", "application/json");
465 add_cors_headers(res, *ctx);
466
467 if (!ctx->database) {
468 res.code = 503;
469 res.body = make_error_json("DATABASE_UNAVAILABLE",
470 "Database not configured");
471 return res;
472 }
473
474 // Verify item exists
475 auto item = ctx->database->find_worklist_by_pk(pk);
476 if (!item) {
477 res.code = 404;
478 res.body = make_error_json("NOT_FOUND", "Worklist item not found");
479 return res;
480 }
481
482 auto result = ctx->database->delete_worklist_item(
483 item->step_id, item->accession_no);
484 if (result.is_err()) {
485 res.code = 500;
486 res.body = make_error_json("DELETE_FAILED", result.error().message);
487 return res;
488 }
489
490 res.code = 200;
491 res.body = make_success_json("Worklist item deleted successfully");
492 return res;
493 });
494}

constexpr dicom_tag item
Item.
